gaps: Artifact and weapon numeric roll stats are not stored per-item in client data (synthesis-roll generated) -- only fixed metadata (tier/class/spec/weapon_type) is known; V3: real min/max RANGES are now attached from the community catalog (weapons[].ranges, artifacts[].main_stat/secondaries_possible, combat.stat_rolls) -- the per-item ROLL is still random within those ranges.

V3: weapon flavor text now filled for 26 weapons from the community catalog descriptions; weapon 'name' remains the raw internal display name (e.g. 'Bow Cha Ran 2H Amazon') -- catalog display names are kept in weapons[].catalog_name where matched.

Only 5 of 18 masteries have weapon items with a populated 'weapon' sub-object in the client build (Champion Destroyer/Ranger/Defender, Bomber Blast Medic, Warmonger Shaman); the other 13 masteries' weapons are unmodeled yet or exist only as off-hand/shield stubs.

V3: rune descriptions now filled for 95 rune entries from client localization text (formulas kept verbatim, including unresolved value placeholders -- the numeric fill values are server-side); the remaining entries have no localization text anywhere in the client. Advanced/Basic rune tiers (T1/T2/T3) are still encoded into the display name (schema has no tier field). 458/556 rune-kind client records remain dropped as internal plumbing.

32/63 named curated hero abilities could not be joined to a keyed/iconed client ability record. V2: the engine code-prefix scheme now covers 16 of 18 masteries (C=Champion, O=Warmonger, D=Pain Reaper, DW=Mercenary, P=Paladin, B2=Grenadier -- each family join is only accepted when the client record's own description literally names the mastery, see abilities[].params.join_note). Bomber Blast Medic and Infiltrator have NO ability records under this code scheme in the current client build (the whole B family contains only the Grenadier passive), so their kits stay unjoined.

heroes[].masteries[].damage_type (basic-attack damage school) is an INFERENCE from weapon type + ability description text, not a client field: magical for Grenadier (plasma gun, all ability text says magic damage + a Spell Power stacking buff), Pyromancer (magic orb) and Warlock (book of the dead, DoT curses); physical for the other 15 masteries -- including judgment calls where the kit mixes schools: Blast Medic (launcher, Q/W text says physical despite the support role), Shaman (fist-weapon autos, E is magic), Engineer (Q/E physical; its turrets deal magic separately), Hand of the Light and Cleric (melee hammer/mace autos; several abilities and all heals are magical/Heal & Shield Power-scaled).

abilities[].params.display and the numeric params extensions (range_m/radius_m/cone_deg/per-rank arrays) are DISPLAY-GRADE: regex-mined from ability description text plus the joined client record's raw parameter codes -- explicit numbers only, nothing inferred; params.confidence marks provenance quality ('low' = indirect record or automated attribution). mana_cost is null everywhere: no corroborated source exists (the client's raw mana-cost code appears on too few records to validate).

3 of 6 heroes (Mercenary, Paladin, Pain Reaper) have no dedicated portrait art anywhere in the client -- portrait is null for the hero and all 3 of their masteries (only the generic npc_bluesphere placeholder exists in-game for these classes).
23/40 stat definitions have a matching icon asset (V3: 23 extracted from the game client); the rest fall back to the UI's initials/glyph placeholder.

hero_base_stats reflects a single shared shared engine hero template used by all 6 heroes (per curated extraction); values are raw engine fields, not confirmed Level-1 character-sheet totals -- see hero_base_stats._shared_template.
artifact_secondary_slots / weapon_chip_sockets base tables in mechanics are an unverified approximation per internal curation notes -- flagged for in-game verification.

V3: combat.stat_rolls and combat.weapon_base are now REBUILT from the community catalog's real ranges (value = range midpoint, range kept, source URL per cell). CAVEAT: the catalog publishes ONE range per item spanning its full quality variance, so the same range fills all 4 rarity cells (explicit note on every cell); the per-rarity split is still unpublished. combat.artifact_actives stays [] -- artifact ACTIVES now live on artifacts[].active (21 entries with cooldowns, community-sourced); the old negative-result trail for client data remains in combat.assumptions.

V3 star model (mechanics.star_model): stat ranges are real (community catalog + client basket catalog), but the star->value quintile mapping is an ASSUMPTION pending in-game confirmation -- flagged in star_model.status.

V3 mastery trees: 7 specs fully built from client data (nodes/edges/per-level values); the other 11 are stubs/prototypes in the client (built:false). Node level-value tables are raw engine params (AV/AC*/ACP* columns) -- parameter semantics per node are not decoded; texts and level-3 bonuses are verbatim.

V3 talent trees: exact client per-rank value tables cover 49/135 choices (hunter/mage/pathfinder value tables are empty in this client build -- web-published progressions used there, flagged per choice via 'confidence'/'cross_check'). Farmer tree ships flagged live:false; the empty Crafter stub is omitted.

V4: exact per-(item, stat, RARITY) roll bands now ship on artifacts/weapons/chips/runes as stat_bands (integer rolls, step 1, bounded; rarity changes the band; Upgraded/Overclocked does NOT change stat bounds -- it gates sockets/perks only). Chips and active runes are now fully numeric (chip bands + effect templates; all reference-DB active runes matched) -- supersedes the older 'no numeric chip/rune data' status. Known upstream holes in the reference DB itself: Commando and Grenadier weapons return zero rows, and Pain Reaper / Mercenary / Paladin weapons are absent entirely (unreleased classes); those items keep the generic fallbacks. Advanced/Basic Mysticism runes have no band rows either (active runes only). Artifacts have a single published band (no per-rarity variance upstream) -- repeated across rarity keys with an explicit per-item note.

V5: artifact secondary-slot counts are TIER-dependent (probe-verified: T1/T2 implants 2/3/4/5 by rarity, T3 implants 0/1/2/3) -- see mechanics.artifact_secondary_slots.by_tier; the old flat 'base' key stays as a deprecated back-compat alias.

V6: the secondary-stat roll-value hole is CLOSED. The game client's own roll tables were fully decoded (per stat: 3 item tiers x 4 quality slots x [min,max]) and PROVEN: 111/112 previously-known community bands reproduced exactly, and live server roll captures agree; the single mismatch (T1 Nano Tissue Magic Resistance, community [7,15]) was stale community data -- the client band [10,30] now ships. combat.secondary_bands carries real [min,max] per stat x tier x rarity for all 20 secondary stats; combat.stat_rolls is rebuilt client-exact (community kept as per-cell cross-check notes); item stat_bands carry per-stat provenance ('client' / 'client+community' / 'client (community value stale)'). The remaining assumption is only the 1..5 star quintile mapping (see mechanics.star_model.status).

heroes.name: Champion
heroes.description: Noble warriors who seek out battle and live for glory, Champions fight with a mix of ranged and melee attacks and shield defense - launching volleys of arrows, striking enemies with their mighty sword, and rarely ever denting their shield.

masteries.name: Destroyer
masteries.description: A melee bruiser specializing in two-handed swords, diving into the heart of battle with high survivability to deal heavy damage. Stacks Attack Power with every hit until it can unleash a whirling special attack.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: Dashes to a target area, dealing physical damage to enemies in the path.

params.numbers_source: params_raw (matched ability ab_monster_phoenix_lord_claw_strike, code C1Q -- a monster-tagged reuse of the Destroyer Q's ability code). cooldown_s=2.0s is implausibly short for a hero dash-opener and is flagged low-confidence (kept, not excluded, since it's the only number available).; fields cone_deg+radius_m+range_m from the joined client record's raw ability parameters (display-grade, decoded code table)

abilities.description_client:
The champion performs a dash into the chosen area and deals {{Data.0.ADF}} = [{{Data.0.AC1}} + {{Data.0.ACP1}} AttackPower] physical damage in the area in front of them. Enemies hit along the path of the dash also take 50% of the damage.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.2 to dash distance.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

abilities.name: Circular Strike
abilities.description: Performs a circular strike dealing physical damage; enemies in the outer radius take 30% increased damage.
abilities.description_client:
The Destroyer throws their weapon in a chosen area. It deals {{Data.0.ADF}} = [100% AttackPower] physical damage to all enemies in this area.

Additional 10% of AttackPower is consumed along with your base Mana.

abilities.name: War Cry
abilities.description: Lets out a roar, gaining a 20-second buff that increases health and Attack Power.

params.numbers_source: description_text ('gains a 20 seconds buff'); no scaling %, cooldown, or cast time published anywhere in the client data.

abilities.description_client:
The champion lets out a cry and receives a {{@O8FCeyRJLES:Data.0.T}} second buff that increases their {{@O8FCeyRJLES:Data.0.ACP3}} = [{{@O8FCeyRJLES:Data.0.ACP1}} + 2% SpellPower] health and {{@O8FCeyRJLES:Data.0.ACP3}} = [{{@O8FCeyRJLES:Data.0.ACP1}} + 2% SpellPower] attack power.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.25% to the strength of all buff effects
Using this ability resets Autoattack  Cooldown.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

abilities.name: Crushing Leap
abilities.description: Leaps to a target location, dealing physical damage on landing and stunning all enemies in the area for 2 seconds.

params.numbers_source: description_text_heuristic (curated ability description text, first '<N> second(s)' match; no client ability record joined for this ability)

abilities.description_client:
The champion performs a leap to a selected location. Upon landing, they deal {{Data.0.ADF}} = [{{Data.0.AC1}} + {{Data.0.ACP1}} AttackPower] physical damage and stun all enemies in the area for {{@O8FCf3d2Zc3:Data.0.T}} seconds.
Damage increases by 0.5% for every 1% of the target's missing Health.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

abilities.name: Battle Frenzy
abilities.description: Each basic attack or ability hit grants 1% bonus Attack Power, stacking up to 10 charges; at maximum charges the Destroyer can activate a whirlwind, dealing physical damage to all nearby enemies over 5 seconds.

params.numbers_source: description_text ('The charge lasts 5 seconds and refreshes'). The 1%-Attack-Power-per-stack (10 stacks), 0.5s whirl tick and +10% move speed at max stacks are real numbers stated in the curated description but don't fit the damage/scaling/cooldown/cast/duration schema (they're a stacking passive, not a single-cast ability) -- see the full ability description text.

abilities.description_client:
For each auto-attack or ability use that hit the enemy, the Destroyer receives a 1% Attack Speed. The buff stacks up to 10 times. Each charge last for 5 seconds and is refreshed on a successful auto attack.

Upon activating the special ability (possible only at 10 charges), the Destroyer starts spinning around himself, dealing {{Data.0.ADF}} = [ {{Data.0.ACP1}} AttackPower] physical damage to all nearby enemies every {{Data.0.Tt}} = [AttackSpeed] seconds for {{Data.0.T}} seconds. After the ability ends, all charges are reset.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.75 seconds to effect duration.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

masteries.name: Ranger
masteries.description: A ranged specialization using bow and arrows, toggling between stances for single-target or multi-target damage. Excels at crowd control and mobility in group fights.

abilities.name: Net Shot
abilities.description: Fires an arrow with a net in a target direction, dealing physical damage to the first enemy hit and rooting them.
abilities.description_client:
A shot of an arrow with an attached net, skill shot, deals {{Data.0.ADF}} = [{{Data.0.AC1}} + {{Data.0.ACP1}} AttackPower] a small physical damage and applies a {{@O8FCeTW6cuf:Data.0.T}} seconds immobilization effect.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.3 seconds to immobilization effect duration.

Mana cost is increased by 5% of your AttackPower and by 5% of your SpellPower.

abilities.name: Arrow Rain
abilities.description: Rains arrows on a target area for 2 seconds, dealing physical damage each second and slowing all enemies inside.

params.numbers_source: params_raw (ab_hero_c2w, cast_time) + description_text ('for the next 2 seconds ... once in a second').

abilities.description_client:
Firing a volley of arrows into the specified area deals {{Data.0.ADF}} = [{{Data.0.ADC1}} + {{Data.0.ACP2}} AttackPower] + {{Data.0.ACP1}} = [5% + 1% SpellPower] missing Health physical damage and slows affected enemies by {{@O8FCfJUNT4L:Data.0.ACP1}} for 3 seconds.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +2% to slowing power.

Mana cost is increased by 5% of your AttackPower and by 5% of your SpellPower.

abilities.name: Barrage Stance
abilities.description: Toggles between two stances: standard basic attacks, or barrage stance where basic attacks deal 50% reduced damage but hit the two nearest targets with on-hit effects.
abilities.description_client:
Switch between two stances. Each switch takes 1 second.

Standard Stance: Basic attacks ignore {{Data.0.AV}} points of Armor for each arrow on the target.

Barrage Stance: Basic attacks also hit the nearest 2 targets (additional targets also receive on-hit effects). All targets hit receive {{Data.3.AVk2}} physical damage. Arrows remain in the affected targets. Each shot consumes {{Data.0.Mp}} Mana.
Weapon Specialization Bonus -0.2 seconds to cooldown time.

abilities.name: Saltation
abilities.description: Fires a volley of arrows in front of the Ranger, dealing physical damage and disarming all enemies hit, then leaps 4 meters back.

params.numbers_source: params_raw sourced from same-code sibling ab_hero_c2r_TEST (a test-tagged duplicate of code C2R); T=10s taken as the disarm-effect duration. The sibling's CS=10s ('cast time') was excluded as implausible for a leap+volley ultimate -- see internal data pass's suspicious-values note.

abilities.description_client:
Performs a shot in a cone in front of themselves and then recoils backward. Enemies hit receive significant damage {{Data.0.ADF}} = [{{Data.0.AC1}} + {{Data.0.ACP1}} AttackPowerBonus_loc] and become disarmed for 2 seconds.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

abilities.name: Harpoon Arrows
abilities.description: Basic attacks leave arrows stuck in enemies, granting stacking bonus attack speed (up to 10 stacks); activating the passive detonates the stuck arrows for bonus physical damage.
abilities.description_client:
The Ranger's auto-attacks leave arrows in enemies. For each arrow, the ranger gains a {{@7iJGeO6tMOQ:Data.0.AsK+}} increase in attack speed, stacking up to 6 times. The special ability can be activated, detonating all arrows in enemies and dealing {{@O8FCeU4QwJ9:Data.0.ACP4}} = [{{@O8FCeU4QwJ9:Data.0.ACP1}} + 0.25% SpellPower] targets maximum Health magical damage to them.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +1% to attack speed bonus on 6 arrows.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

masteries.name: Defender
masteries.description: A sword-and-shield tank that withstands heavy incoming damage, reduces damage to allies, and taunts enemies to hold aggro in group content.

abilities.name: Empowered Strike
abilities.description: Enhances the next basic attack, dealing bonus damage and reducing incoming damage for 10 seconds; stacks up to 5 times.

params.numbers_source: description_text_heuristic (curated ability description text, first '<N> second(s)' match; no client ability record joined for this ability)

abilities.description_client:
The Defender empowers their next basic attack, resetting the auto-attack timer, receiving +20% increase in MoveSpeed for 2 seconds. An empowered basic attack during 7 seconds permits them to hit a target with a powerful strike dealing {{Data.0.ADF}} = [({{Data.0.AC1}}) + ({{Data.0.ACP1}})AttackPower] physical damage. After this empowered strike, the Defender buffs themself with Offensive Fortitude, which reduces incoming damage by {{@7iJGeEFs3Jn:Data.0.ACP1}}. This effect lasts {{@7iJGeEFs3Jn:Data.0.T}} seconds, stacks up to 3 times, and refreshes its effect period with each stack. Generates 130% aggro.

If Defender kills a target with Champion Strike, instantly reset Assault's/Sweeping Strike's cooldown.

Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.15% incoming damage reduction per stack.
Additional 10% of AttackPower is consumed along with your base Mana.

abilities.name: Shield Throw
abilities.description: Throws the shield at a target, stunning it and ricocheting between several enemies, dealing physical damage; the cooldown is reduced on hit.

params.numbers_source: params_raw (matched ability ab_monster_scrag_phoenix_lord_plasma_vortex, code C3W -- a monster-tagged reuse of the Defender W's ability code). duration_s=3.0 is ambiguous (may be 'time before the shield must be picked up' rather than a buff duration) -- kept but flagged uncertain.; fields radius_m from the joined client record's raw ability parameters (display-grade, decoded code table)

abilities.description_client:
The Defender throws their shield at a target within a {{Data.0.R}} meter radius. When the shield hits the target, it bounces back to the Defender, dealing {{Data.0.ADF}} = [({{Data.0.AC1}}) + ({{Data.0.ACP1}})AttackPower + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})Armor] physical damage and stunning the target for {{@2E5Uu2QWR93:Data.0.T}} seconds.

Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.15 seconds to stun duration.

If the shield hits the target, reduce Shield Throw's cooldown by 30%, upon returning or picking up the shield. If the skill shot misses, the Defender loses the shield's Armor bonus and must pick up the shield by running over it. The ability generates a significant amount of aggro.

Additional 10% of AttackPower is consumed along with your base Mana.

abilities.name: Assault
abilities.description: Jumps to a target location, dealing physical damage on landing and taunting all nearby enemies for 2 seconds.

params.numbers_source: params_raw (matched ability ab_monster_goblin_assassin_main_attack, code C3E -- a monster-tagged reuse of the Defender E's ability code). ZR/ZA/ZD present in params_raw (2m/90deg/2s) but not used here: ZD (zone duration) has only a single corroborating example client-wide and is excluded per the honesty rule.; fields cone_deg+radius_m from the joined client record's raw ability parameters (display-grade, decoded code table)

abilities.description_client:
The Defender jumps {{Data.0.R}} meters to a target location and in {{Data.0.ZR}} meters radius deals {{Data.0.ADF}} = [({{Data.0.AC1}}) + ({{Data.0.ACP1}})AttackPower] physical damage, taunting all damaged enemies to attack them for {{@2E5Uu1im4sZ:Data.0.T}} seconds.

Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.2 seconds to taunt duration.

Additional 10% of AttackPower is consumed along with your base Mana.

abilities.name: Mobile Barrier
abilities.description: Raises the shield, reflecting incoming frontal damage while staying mobile and immune to crowd control, and creates a reduced-damage zone for allies behind the Defender.
abilities.description_client:
Raises the shield and for a short duration reflects all the incoming damage from the front back to an enemy. The Defender is still able to move while reflecting the damage. Preserving the type of reflected damage, the Defender becomes immune to crowd control and damage. They also create an area behind their backs in which allies take {{@5L58Y8:Data.0.Ipd+}} less damage. Must have shield in hand to activate the R ability.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

abilities.name: Vanguard
abilities.description: The Defender gains bonus Armor and Magic Resistance for each nearby enemy.
abilities.description_client:
The Defender gains {{@2E5Uu6tu9UO:Modifiers.0.val}} bonus Armor and Resist for each enemy or friend(up to 6) in the {{Data.0.R}} meters radius around the Defender.

Additionally for each stack Defender gains {{Data.0.ACP1}} = [(2.5%) for every 1000  Max Health] aggro generation and {{Data.0.ACP2}} = [(0.8%) for every 1000 Max Health] abilities damage.

Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.5 to aura radius.

heroes.name: Warmonger
heroes.description: Only the strongest of the orcs can become Warmongers; hardened by innumerable battles, they won't be stopped by any threat. They can suppress enemies with heavy minigun fire, hold the frontline with spear and shield, or command elements and spirits as shamans.

masteries.name: Commando
masteries.description: A ranged minigun specialist whose heavy fire penetrates enemy armor. Commando abilities have no cooldowns - they consume ammo instead, and reloading is tied to the tripod special ability.

abilities.name: Minigun Torrent
abilities.description: Fires a torrent of shots in a target direction for 3 seconds, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit every 0.5 seconds; the Commando can move while shooting.

params.numbers_source: params_raw sourced from same-code sibling ab_hero_o2q_test (code O2Q): only Tt=0.5 corroborates the description's 'every 0.5 seconds' tick (kept as context, not a schema field); T=0.4 conflicts with the stated 3-second channel and was excluded as unreliable; CS=1.0 excluded (unclear if it's a per-shot wind-up or something else).

abilities.description_client:
The Commando fires a torrent of shots from their minigun at a target direction for 3 seconds. Every 0.5 seconds, all enemies hit take physical damage. While shooting, the Commando can still move.

Improvement: critical strike chance increased by 10%. You can slightly change the direction of the shot.

abilities.name: Smoke Canister
abilities.description: Throws a smoke canister dealing physical damage in an area; enemies inside the smoke have reduced sight range and 50% reduced movement speed.

params.numbers_source: params_raw sourced from same-code sibling ab_hero_o2w_aura (code O2W).

abilities.description_client:
The Commando throws a smoke canister dealing physical damage to an area. Enemies have their sight range reduced, and while they're in the range of smoke, their movement speed reduced by 50%.

Improvement: all enemies hit are rooted.

abilities.name: Piercing Shell
abilities.description: Fires a piercing shell in a target direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies in its path and applying a stacking armor-reduction debuff (up to 3 stacks).

params.numbers_source: description_text ('armor reduction debuff for 5 seconds. The effect stacks up to 3 times').

abilities.description_client:
The Commando fires a piercing shell in a target direction, hitting all enemies in its path. Enemies take physical damage and armor reduction debuff for 5 seconds. The effect stacks up to 3 times.

Improvement: critical damage power increased by 50%; enemies are knocked back and get the maximum amount of armor reduction stacks.

abilities.name: Tripod Minigun
abilities.description: Mounts the minigun on a tripod: damage increases, abilities are improved and gain range, but the Commando cannot move until the tripod is uninstalled by recasting.
abilities.description_client:
The Commando places a tripod and mounts a minigun on the ground. The damage they deal increases, their abilities are improved and have increased range.

While the minigun is fixed on the tripod, the Commando can't move.

When the Commando re-casts the ability, they uninstall the tripod and pick up the minigun.

abilities.name: Ammo System
abilities.description: Abilities have no cooldowns but consume 1 ammo each (4 ammo in stock); the minigun fires at a fixed rate and is reloaded (4 seconds) by activating the special ability.

params.numbers_source: description_text ('Reload time is 4 seconds'). Reported as cooldown_s since the Commando has no per-ability cooldowns (ammo-based kit) -- this is the minigun's reload timer, not a traditional ability cooldown; flagged for clarity, not excluded.

abilities.description_client:
The Commando has no cooldown on abilities, but they consume 1 ammo. The Commando has 4 ammo in stock.

The minigun fires at a fixed rate.

The Commando reloads the minigun upon activating the special ability. Reload time is 4 seconds.

masteries.name: Legionary
masteries.description: A tank that fights with spear and shield and specializes in controlling enemies - stunning, slowing and taunting them while making them vulnerable to follow-up abilities.

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.description: Smashes enemies in front with the shield, dealing physical damage, knocking them back and making them vulnerable; interrupts enemy spellcasting.
abilities.description_client:
The Legionary strikes enemies with their shield, dealing {{Data.0.ADF}} = [{{Data.0.AC1}} + {{Data.0.ACP1}} AttackPowerBonus_loc + {{Data.0.ACP2}} Armor] physical damage. The impact knocks back enemies and makes them vulnerable for {{@O8FCeJfcz60:Data.0.T}} seconds. If the ability hits an enemy casting a spell, it interrupts the spell and puts it on cooldown. Causes {{Data.0.ACP3}} aggro.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +12% aggro generation for this ability.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

abilities.name: Catapult
abilities.description: Throws the nearest ally or enemy to a target area, dealing physical damage to enemies there; a tossed enemy also stuns vulnerable enemies where it lands, while a tossed ally takes no damage.

params.numbers_source: fields radius_m from the joined client record's raw ability parameters (display-grade, decoded code table)

abilities.description_client:
The Legionary throws the nearest ally or enemy to a target area. All enemies in that area take {{Data.0.ACP3}} = [{{Data.0.ACP1}} + 5% AttackPower] target Max Health physical damage(Max {{Data.0.AC1}} versus monsters). The tossed enemy also takes damage and stuns all vulnerable enemies for {{@O8FCeIiLE2s:Data.0.T}} seconds within a 2.5m radius. The tossed ally takes no damage.
Makes 130% aggro
Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.2 meters to throw distance.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

abilities.name: Spear Throw
abilities.description: Readies and throws a spear that gains range and damage the longer it is charged, dealing physical damage to all enemies in its path; a vulnerable enemy hit is taunted into attacking the Legionary.

params.numbers_source: description_text ('forcing to attack the Legionary for 2 seconds').

abilities.description_client:
The Legionary readies and throws a spear in a target direction. The throw gains extra range, damage, and mana cost the longer the Legionary spends preparing to launch the spear. It deals {{Data.0.AV2}}-{{Data.0.wq1v1}} = [{{Data.0.AC1}} + {{Data.0.ACP1}} AttackPower] physical damage to all enemies in its path. If the spear hits a vulnerable enemy, it taunts them, forcing them to attack the Legionary for {{@O8FCeNiuWJ4:Data.0.T}} seconds. Taunts monsters even if they are not vulnerable.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.3 meters to spear throw distance.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

abilities.name: Unstoppable
abilities.description: Removes all crowd-control effects and grants reduced damage taken and bonus movement speed for several seconds; restores a portion of health on an enemy kill or assist.

params.numbers_source: description_text ('For 8 seconds, they take reduced damage, gain bonus movement speed').

abilities.description_client:
The Legionary removes all crowd control effects from themselves and applies a buff for {{@Zv0qP4:Data.0.T}} seconds. During the buff, the Legionary gains bonuses to movement speed of {{@Zv0qP4:Data.0.MsK+}} = [10% + 5% AttackPower] and reduces incoming damage by {{@Zv0qP4:Data.0.Ipd+}}. For each target killed or a target in which the Warmonger participated in the kill, they restore 10% of their missing health.

While Unstoppable is active, the Legionary generates 100% more aggro.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

abilities.name: Iron Skin
abilities.description: Each time the Legionary hits a target with an ability, they gain 1% Armor and 1% Magic Resistance for 10 seconds, stacking up to 10 times.

params.numbers_source: description_text_heuristic (curated ability description text, first '<N> second(s)' match; no client ability record joined for this ability)

abilities.description_client:
Each time the Legionary hits a target with an attack, they gain 1% armor and 1% magic resistance for 10 seconds. The effect stacks up to 10 times.

When the Legionary has 10 stacks part of the Legionary's armor and magic resistance is converted into {{Data.0.AC3}} = [{{Data.0.ACP3}} Armor + {{Data.0.ACP2}} Resist] AttackPowerBonus_loc.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.5% to total armor resistance.

masteries.name: Shaman
masteries.description: A melee fighter from a kindred of orcs who talk with animal spirits and command the elements, fighting with fist weapons alongside a summoned wolf. Basic attacks build elemental charges that empower totems and spells with fire, water or earth effects.

abilities.name: Rip Apart
abilities.description: Leaps to the target and delivers destabilizing strikes: the next 4 auto-attacks reduce the target's Armor and Magic Resistance and briefly immobilize it; with 5 elemental charges the immobilize is greatly extended.

params.numbers_source: description_text ('reduce the target's armor and magical resistance by 5 units per auto-attack for 6 seconds'). The 5-unit armor/MR-reduction and the 1s/5s immobilize variants are real numbers in the client text but don't fit this schema's damage/scaling fields (non-HP-damage debuff) -- see the full ability description text.

abilities.description_client:
The shaman quickly leaps towards the target, preparing to deliver a series of destabilizing strikes. The next 4 following auto-attacks have increased damage {{Data.0.ACP1}} AttackPower and reduce the target's Armor and Resist by {{@7h7vqL2Ys02:Data.0.AC1}} units per auto-attack for {{@7h7vqL2Ys02:Data.0.T}} seconds, the target is immobilized for 1 seconds. With 5 charges of elemental power, the target is immobilized for {{@7h7vqFwE9hf:Data.0.T}} seconds. Consumes all charges of the special ability.

Shift+Q: the shaman can perform an additional dash.

Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.2 to leap distance.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your AttackPower.

abilities.name: Totemic Fury
abilities.description: Passively increases the Shaman's and the wolf's attack and movement speed; with 5 elemental charges, summons a Fire, Healing or Wolf totem depending on the chosen element.

params.numbers_source: params_raw (ab_hero_o3w, own record: Mp=5 mana cost [not modeled in this schema], C=5 cooldown -- flagged low-confidence since the ability is really gated by a 5-elemental-charge resource, not a cooldown timer) + description_text ('summon a totem ... for 8 seconds').

abilities.description_client:
Passive: Through meditation, the shaman increases both his and the wolf's {{Data.0.ACP5}} AttackSpeed and {{Data.0.ACP4}} MoveSpeed.
Active: With 5 charges of elemental power, the shaman can activate the skill and summon a totem within a 6-meter radius for {{Data.1.T}} seconds. The type of totem depends on the chosen element in a special skill:
- Fire element - Fire Totem. Deals {{Data.0.ADF}} = [({{Data.0.AC1}})+({{Data.0.ACP1}})SpellPower] magical damage to enemy within an {{Data.1.R}}-meter radius every 0.75 seconds. 
- Water element - Healing Totem. Restores {{Data.0.ADF2}} = [({{Data.0.AC2}})+({{Data.0.ACP2}})HLPower] health to the shaman and his allies within a {{Data.1.R}}-meter radius every 0.75 seconds. 
- Earth element - Wolf Totem. Enhances the shaman's attacks by {{Data.0.ADF3}} = [({{Data.0.AC3}}) + ({{Data.0.ACP3}})AttackPower] within an {{Data.1.R}}-meter radius. Allies receive 50% of the enhancements. 
The totem consumes all charges of the special ability.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.5 seconds to totem duration.
Mana cost is increased by 10% of your HLPower, SpellPower or AttackPower, depending on the chosen totem.

abilities.name: Lightning Strike
abilities.description: Gathers electricity and releases lightning at the target, dealing magic damage; with 5 elemental charges the cast is instant.
abilities.description_client:
The shaman gathers electricity from the atmosphere and releases lightning at the target, dealing {{Data.0.ADF2}} = [{{Data.0.ADC1}} + ({{Data.0.ACP1}})SpellPower] magical damage. Gives 1 stack of elemental power. With 5 charges of elemental power, the cast is instant. Consumes all charges of the special ability.
At 5 stacks of Earth Elemental Mastery, Lightning Strike is replaced by Static Charge.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +0.5% lightning critical strike chance.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your SpellPower.

abilities.name: Call of the Wild
abilities.description: Summons a spiritually-bonded wolf whose stats equal 50% of the Shaman's; the wolf can be commanded, and its death costs the Shaman 15% of their health.

params.numbers_source: params_raw (ab_hero_o3r, own record: C=5, flagged low-confidence for the same charge-gating reason as Totemic Fury above) + description_text ('during 5 seconds' health-transfer channel). The 50% stat-share / 15% health cost / 1%-per-second-transfer / 3%-per-second-wolf-gain numbers are real but are pet stat-inheritance mechanics, not a damage/scaling number -- see curated hero data.

abilities.description_client:
The shaman summons a wolf. There is a strong spiritual connection between the wolf and the shaman. The AttackPower, AttackSpeed, HPBonus, Armor, and Resist of the wolf are 50% of the shaman's stats. If the wolf dies, the shaman loses 30% of his current health.

The Wolf gains stacks of Elemental Mastery with each hit. At 4 stacks, instead of an auto-attack, the wolf will use a paw strike empowered by the Shaman's element.

Fire Element: The paw strike creates an explosion at the point of impact, dealing {{Data.1.ADF}} = [{{Data.0.AV}} + ({{Data.0.AVk}})SpellPower] magic damage and leaving a burning zone for 3 seconds.
Water Element: The paw strike creates a healing explosion at the point of impact, healing all party members for {{Data.2.ADF}} = [{{Data.0.AV}} + ({{Data.0.AVk}})HLPower ] HP within the area.
Earth Element: The paw strike creates an explosion at the point of impact, dealing {{Data.3.ADF}} = [{{Data.0.AV}} + ({{Data.0.AVk}})AttackPower] physical damage and slowing enemies.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your SpellPower.

abilities.name: Elemental Mastery
abilities.description: Every third auto-attack grants bonus attack speed and a charge of elemental power; at 5 charges the Shaman can toggle between fire, water and earth elements.
abilities.description_client:
Every 3rd auto-attack, the shaman increases his AttackSpeed by 3% for 7 seconds and gains a charge of the elemental power. When the number of charges reaches 5, the shaman can summon the forces of the elements to his aid and improve his skills. By activating the special ability, the shaman switches between the elements of fire, water, and earth over 1.5 seconds.
While in the Earth element at 5 stacks, Lightning Strike is replaced by Static Charge.
Weapon Specialization Bonus +1% to total attack speed.

heroes.name: Bomber
heroes.description: Coming of age in a concrete jungle surrounded by street gangs at war, Bombers had to grow up early and survived on trickery and razor-sharp wit. They champion speed and explosives, using illusions and hoaxes to confuse and outmaneuver their enemies.

masteries.name: Blast Medic
masteries.description: A ranged support that fires explosive ordnance from a launcher, healing and shielding allies while damaging and blinding enemies. Weaves in decoys and a multi-purpose drone for tactical flexibility.

abilities.name: Ricochet Bomb
abilities.description: Throws a bomb that damages enemies and heals allies, ricocheting off targets twice with damage increasing and healing decreasing on each bounce.
abilities.description_client:
The Blast Medic throws a bomb, which deals {{Data.0.ADF2}} = [{{Data.0.ADC1}}+ {{Data.0.ACP1}} SpellPower] magic damage to enemies and heals allies by {{Data.0.ADF3}} = [{{Data.0.AC1}} + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})HLPower]. The bomb ricochets off the targets 2 times.
With every ricochet, the damage dealt to enemies increases by {{Data.0.AVk3}}, and the healing effect to allies decreases by {{Data.0.AVk3}}. If the ability is used on an enemy and does not ricochet, its  Cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds, and 50% of the Mana spent is restored. The Blast Medic will need some time to use the ability.
Weapon Specialization Bonus: 3% casting time reduction.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your SpellPower or HLPower, depending on the selected target.

Upon collision with the clone, enemies receive {{Data.0.ADF3}} = [{{Data.0.AC1}} + {{Data.0.ACP1}} SpellPower] magic damage, while allies {{Data.0.ADF2}} = [{{Data.0.AC3}} + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})HLPower] health. Decoy takes 300% damage from players, but only 50% damage from monsters.

Mana cost is increased by 10% of your SpellPower or HLPower, whichever is higher..

abilities.name: Fusion
abilities.description: Deploys a drone onto a target hero: it heals and speeds up an ally, shields and reflects damage for the Blast Medic, or debuffs and damages an enemy.

Enhancement 2: The Bomber delivers the next 3 auto-attacks at maximum attack speed {{@7h7vqvbiuAe:Data.0.ACP1}}.
Enhancement 3: Damage of the next ability is increased by {{@7h7vr5nEAYV:Data.0.ACP2}}.

masteries.description: A melee assassin built around stealth and burst - opening from invisibility, laying hidden mines, and executing low-health targets with shadow-step strikes.

abilities.description_client:

Tether with an enemy deals magic damage over time. Damage increases over time.
 
When tethered to an ally, the Warlock sacrifices a portion of their health and additionally heals the ally. Healing increases over time.

The ability can affect two enemies.

abilities.description: Debuffs an enemy so the Warlock's next basic attack fears them for 2 seconds, leaving damage-over-time and a slow when the fear ends; can be recast on an ally to soulbind them and heal them for the damage dealt.

abilities.description_client:
The Warlock debuffs an enemy. After a 1-second delay, their next basic attack against the debuffed enemy strikes the enemy with fear that lasts 2 seconds.

When the fear effect is activated, the ability can be re-cast on an ally binding their and the enemy's souls together.

When the fear effect expires, debuffs are triggered. They deal magic damage over 10 seconds and reduce movement speed by 30% for 3 seconds. The soulbound ally is healed by the amount of damage dealt, and gets additional healing.

abilities.description: Detonates all of the Warlock's active damage-over-time effects for burst magic damage while active healing effects restore ally health; the effects remain active afterwards.

params.numbers_source: fields cooldown_s from the joined client record's raw ability parameters (display-grade, decoded code table)
params.join_note: joined by engine code family D3R -- accepted because the client record's own description names the mastery ('warlock')

abilities.description_client:
The Warlock's damage-over-time effects explode on all affected enemies, dealing magic damage per effect.
For every active Warlock's healing effect, allies restore their health. 
After the explosion, the effects remain active on their targets.

abilities.description: Each active DoT on an enemy grants 5% Spell Power and each active ally buff grants 5% healing efficiency; activating sacrifices 20% of current health for a shield worth 300% of the sacrificed health plus bonus movement speed.

params.join_note: joined by engine code family D3T -- accepted because the client record's own description names the mastery ('warlock')

abilities.description_client:
For every active damage-over-time debuff on an enemy, the Warlock's Spell Power increases by 5%.

For every active buff on an ally, the Warlock gains 5% healing efficiency.

On activating the special ability, the Warlock sacrifices 20% of their current health to shield them for 300% of the sacrificed health. The Warlock's movement speed increases by 30%. Shield and bonus movement speed lasts 5 seconds.

heroes.name: Mercenary
heroes.description: Coming from a cold-hearted world of eternal winter, Mercenaries are not used to feeling pity: it's kill or be killed. The hero fights as a coordinated squad - Snipers take out enemies from a distance, Berserkers break through enemy ranks, covered by heavy fire from Engineers' turrets.

masteries.name: Sniper
masteries.description: A master of stealth and long-range combat, devastatingly efficient at taking down enemies from afar with a rifle. Trades durability for precision, chambering special cartridges and relying on staying hidden to survive.

abilities.description: Fires in a target direction, dealing physical damage to the first enemy hit and stacking an armor-reduction debuff; with Magnum cartridges it pierces and slows all enemies in its path.
abilities.description_client:
The Sniper fires in a target direction, dealing physical damage to the first enemy hit. Hitting a target reduces their armor for 5 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

Additional effect from Magnum cartridges: The shot damages all enemies it hits in its path, slowing them.

abilities.description: Chambers a cartridge; can be cast while moving, and attack speed reduces the cast time.
abilities.description_client:
The Sniper chambers a cartridge. 

This ability can be cast while the Sniper is moving. The Sniper's attack speed reduces the cast time of the ability.

abilities.description: Takes aim and fires at an enemy, dealing physical damage; the cooldown resets on an enemy kill, and Magnum cartridges make the shot always critically strike.
abilities.description_client:
The Sniper aims and fires at an enemy, dealing physical damage. The cooldown resets on an enemy kill.

Additional effect from Magnum cartridges: the ability always deals critical damage.

abilities.description: Loads a magazine of Magnum cartridges, giving shots additional effects for 10 seconds.

params.numbers_source: description_text_heuristic (curated ability description text, first '<N> second(s)' match; no client ability record joined for this ability)

abilities.description_client: The Sniper loads a magazine of Magnum cartridges. Shots gain additional effect for 10 seconds.

abilities.description: Places a tracking totem revealing an area; the Sniper must chamber cartridges to attack and reloads after 5 shots, turns invisible after standing still for 3 seconds, and gains movement speed after firing abilities.

params.numbers_source: description_text_heuristic (curated ability description text, first '<N> second(s)' match; no client ability record joined for this ability); fields cooldown_s+range_m from the joined client record's raw ability parameters (display-grade, decoded code table)

abilities.description_client:
Activating the special ability allows the Sniper to place a tracking totem that reveals a small area within the fog of war.

Passive: The Sniper can't basic attack. To fire, a cartridge must be chambered. After 5 shots, the Sniper must reload, which takes 1.5 seconds.

If the Sniper stands still for 3 seconds, they become invisible. When the Sniper moves or casts an ability, the invisibility effect ends.

Using the Q or E ability grants bonus movement speed.

masteries.name: Berserker
masteries.description: A melee bruiser that fiercely rushes into the midst of battle with dual battle axes. Fueled by combat, the Berserker's rage grows with each strike, empowering abilities and enabling extra damage.

abilities.name: Axe Throw
abilities.description: Throws an axe at a target location, dealing physical damage to all enemies it passes through and slowing them; picking the axe back up reduces the cooldown.

params.join_note: joined by engine code family DW3Q -- accepted because the client record's own description names the mastery ('berserker')

abilities.description_client:
The Berserker throws an axe at a target location, dealing physical damage to all enemies it passes through, and slowing them. The Berserker can pick up the axe to reduce the ability's cooldown by 3 seconds.

The damage the ability deals is increased by 20% if the Berserker's rage is greater than or equal to 50.

abilities.name: Raging Frenzy
abilities.description: Grants +100% attack speed for the next 4 basic attacks, with the fourth dealing bonus physical damage; causes bleeding at high rage.

params.join_note: joined by engine code family DW3W -- accepted because the client record's own description names the mastery ('berserker')

abilities.description_client:
The Berserker's attack speed is increased by 100% for the next 4 basic attacks. The fourth basic attack deals additional physical damage.

The ability causes an enemy to bleed if the Berserker's rage is greater than or equal to 50.

abilities.name: Leap of Fury
abilities.description: Leaps to a target area, stunning enemies for 1 second, dealing physical damage and generating rage.

abilities.description_client:
The Berserker leaps into a target area, stunning all enemies in the area for 1 second and dealing physical damage.

The leap generates 25 rage.

abilities.name: Rage Unleashed
abilities.description: For 10 seconds gains bonus attack speed and increased damage dealt, and generates double rage.

abilities.description: Basic attacks generate rage (double on critical strikes) and have a 20% chance to land an additional hit; the Berserker gains up to 100% bonus Attack Power based on missing health.

abilities.description_client:

The Berserker gains 0% - 100% bonus attack power (based on their missing health).

masteries.name: Engineer
masteries.description: Utilizes mechanical devices and turrets to control the battlefield, providing both offensive and defensive support. Basic attacks build combo points that empower abilities and upgrade deployed turrets.

abilities.description: Fires at an enemy for physical damage scaling with combo points; cast on a turret instead, buffs its next 3 shots and, at maximum combo, increases its attack range.
abilities.description_client:
If cast on an enemy:
The Engineer fires at the target, dealing [pd]{{Data.0.ADF}}[/pd][hide] ([wh]{{Data.0.AC1}}[/wh]+[ap]{{Data.0.AC2}}[/ap][api]+[uty]{{Data.0.AC4}}[/uty])[/hide] physical damage. Every combo point increases the damage the ability deals by [wh]10%[/wh]. At maximum combo points, a critical damage the ability deals is increased by [wh]50%[/wh].

If cast on a turret:
The Engineer remotely buffs a turret. Its next three shots deal [md]{{@7iJGdtps1HX:Data.0.ACP1}}[/md][hide] ([wh]{{@7iJGdtps1HX:Data.0.ACP3}}[/wh]+[sp]{{@7iJGdtps1HX:Data.0.ACP2}}[/sp][spicon]+[uty]{{@7iJGdtps1HX:Data.0.ACP4}}[/uty])[/hide] more damage. 

Each combo point increases the buffed turret's damage by [wh]5%[/wh] and the number of empowered shots by [wh]1[/wh]. At maximum combo points, the turret's attack range is also increased on [wh]2[/wh] meter.

abilities.description: Deploys an automatic turret dealing magic damage; two nearby turrets link with an electric beam that slows enemies and speeds up allies. Holds 2 charges.
abilities.description_client:
The Engineer places an automatic turret that deals [md]{{Data.0.AC3}}[/md][hide] ([wh]{{Data.0.AC1}}[/wh]+[sp]{{Data.0.AC2}}[/sp][spicon])[/hide] magic damage to all enemies in front of it.

If a second turret is nearby, the two will connect, creating an electric beam that reduces enemies' movement speed by [ms]40%[/ms] and increases allies' movement speed by [ms]30%[/ms].

When placed, turrets have a durability level of 2 (out of a maximum of 4). A turret's durability level decreases over time and when it is damaged by enemies' basic attacks. Each durability level increases the damage the turret deals by [wh]15%[/wh]. The turret is destroyed when its durability level reaches [wh]0[/wh].

Maximum turrets deployed: [wh]{{Data.0.St}}[/wh].

abilities.description: A melee blow dealing physical damage and a 2-second stun, generating 2 combo points; cast on a turret, it emits an electric pulse (magic damage plus slow) and boosts the turret's attack speed.

Generates [wh]2[/wh] combo points.

abilities.description: Instantly maxes combo points and grants a shield; for 7 seconds combo points generate twice as fast and turrets can be targeted remotely.

heroes.name: Paladin
heroes.description: Mighty warriors and defenders, Paladins have made it their mission to wipe out all evil, guided by the sacred light. They are experts at healing and raising the spirits of their allies, but can also knock out enemies with a stroke of their heavy hammer or mace.

masteries.name: Hand of the Light
masteries.description: A melee fighter wielding heavy two-handed weapons who channels the energy of the Light to deal heavy damage while buffing allies. Rewards chaining abilities into empowered basic attacks.

abilities.name: Smite
abilities.description: A powerful melee strike dealing physical damage in a frontal arc and applying a vulnerability debuff that increases the damage the target takes.
abilities.description_client: The Hand of the Light hits with a powerful strike and deals [pd]{{Data.0.ADF}}[/pd][hide] ([wh]{{Data.0.AC1}}[/wh]+[ap]{{Data.0.AC2}}[/ap][api])[/hide] physical damage in the area in front of them. All enemy targets hit by the ability take [wh]{{@O8FCedHEXq5:Data.0.Ipd+}}[/wh][hide] ({{@O8FCedHEXq5:Data.0.ACP1}}+[hp]{{@O8FCedHEXq5:Data.0.ACP2}}[/hp][hpi])[/hide] increased damage.

abilities.name: Beam of Light
abilities.description: Channels a beam dealing magic damage and slowing enemies while cleansing movement-impairing effects from allies it touches; can be recast to shield the caster or an ally.
abilities.description_client:
When the ability is activated, the Hand of the Light releases [wh]5[/wh] meters long beam of light in a target area. All enemies struck by the beam take [md]{{Data.0.ADF}}[/md][hide] ([wh]{{Data.0.AC1}}[/wh]+[sp]{{Data.0.AC2}}[/sp][spicon])[/hide] magic damage and [ms]{{@O8FCe3HCFI3:Data.0.MsK-}}[/ms][hide]([wh]{{@O8FCe3HCFI3:Data.0.ACP1}}[/wh]+[ten]{{@O8FCe3HCFI3:Data.0.ACP2}}[/ten])[/hide] movement speed reduction. Beam removes all slowing effects from the allies who were touched by it.

If the Hand of the Light hits a target with the beam of light, they can recast the ability and shield [shg]{{@O8FCePePCVx:Data.0.AC3}}[/shg][hide] ([wh]{{@O8FCePePCVx:Data.0.AC1}}[/wh]+[mp]{{@O8FCePePCVx:Data.0.AC2}}[/mp][mpi])[/hide] themself or allies.

abilities.name: Mark of Judgement
abilities.description: Marks an enemy for 5 seconds; when the mark expires it deals true damage plus a portion of all damage the target received while marked.

params.numbers_source: description_text_heuristic (curated ability description text, first '<N> second(s)' match; no client ability record joined for this ability)

abilities.description_client: The Hand of the Light marks their enemy for [wh]5[/wh] seconds. abilities.name: Light's Fury

The ability deals [md]{{Data.0.ADC1}}[/md] - [md]{{Data.0.ADC2}}[/md][hide] ([wh]{{Data.0.AC1}}[/wh]+[sp]{{Data.0.AC3}}[/sp][spicon]+[ap]{{Data.0.AC2}}[/ap][api])[/hide] magic damage to the area. The Hand of the Light can move while the ability is being charged. The damage that the ability deals depends on the duration of the charge.

abilities.name: Empowered Strikes
abilities.description: After using any ability, the next basic attack is empowered with bonus magic damage and self-healing, stacking up to 3 times; at maximum stacks grants a movement-speed buff.

masteries.name: Cleric
masteries.description: A melee support wielding dual maces, built around an aggressive playstyle - the Cleric must fight in melee range to heal and shield allies rather than casting safely from the backline, while still dealing solid damage.

abilities.name: Sacred Strike
abilities.description: Attacks an enemy and creates a healing zone around them that periodically heals allies inside; recasting detonates the zone for magic damage to enemies within.
abilities.description_client: The Cleric attacks an enemy with their weapon and deals physical damage. After the strike, a small energy zone is created around the enemy in which the Cleric's allies gain periodic healing. The ability can be recast if the Cleric is in the energy zone. The zone explodes dealing magic damage to enemies. The zone disappears after that.

abilities.name: Light Wave
abilities.description: Releases a wave of light dealing magic damage, rooting enemies for 1.5 seconds and reducing their Armor and Magic Resistance.

params.numbers_source: description_text_heuristic (curated ability description text, first '<N> second(s)' match; no client ability record joined for this ability)

abilities.description_client: The Cleric charges the weapon and releases a light wave in front of them, which deals magic damage and debuffs an enemy reducing their armor and magic resistance. A target is also rooted for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Shield of Grace
abilities.description: Instantly shields the Cleric or a nearby ally; if the shield still has strength when it expires, it explodes and stuns nearby enemies.
abilities.description_client: The Cleric shields themself or an ally. The shield absorbs all incoming damage. If the shield has more than 1 strength point upon its expiration, it triggers a magic explosion in the range of 2.5 meters around the hero. All enemies in the range of the explosion are stunned.

abilities.name: Holy Aura
abilities.description: Creates a 3-second aura around the Cleric that heals nearby allies, increases movement speed and reduces incoming damage; the Cleric can basic-attack but not use other abilities while it is active.

params.numbers_source: description_text_heuristic (curated ability description text, first '<N> second(s)' match; no client ability record joined for this ability)

abilities.description_client: For 3 seconds, the Cleric surrounds themself with an aura, which heals allies, increases the Cleric's movement speed, and reduces the incoming damage. While aura is active, the Cleric can basic attack, but is not able to use abilities.

abilities.name: Divine Charges
abilities.description: Basic attacks generate stacking charges (up to 5) that empower the Cleric's abilities; charges are consumed when an ability is used.

params.join_note: joined by engine code family P2T -- accepted because the client record's own description names the mastery ('cleric')

abilities.description_client:
When attacking, the Cleric gets and stacks charges, which empower their abilities by 2%. Charges stack up to 5 times and are automatically reset when any of the abilities was used. 

Stacked charges will be reset if the special ability is activated, and basic attacks will deal additional magic damage for 10 seconds.

masteries.name: Crusader
masteries.description: A frontline tank wielding shield and morgenstern, built to absorb damage, drag enemies in with chains, and lock down their mobility and escape options while protecting allies.

abilities.name: Chain Pull
abilities.description: Flings a chain in a target direction, dealing physical damage to the first enemy hit, dragging it back to the Crusader and taunting it for 2 seconds.

params.numbers_source: description_text_heuristic (curated ability description text, first '<N> second(s)' match; no client ability record joined for this ability)

abilities.description_client: The Crusader flings a chain in a target direction, which deals physical damage the first enemy it hits and drags an enemy back to the Crusader. The ability taunts enemies to attack the Crusader for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Charged Explosion
abilities.description: Charges for about 2 seconds, then triggers an explosion dealing magic damage in an area.

params.numbers_source: description_text_heuristic (curated ability description text, first '<N> second(s)' match; no client ability record joined for this ability)

abilities.description_client:
The Crusader starts to charge the ability. They can't use any other abilities, launch basic attacks, and move. The ability charges for 2 seconds and triggers an explosion, which deals magic damage.

Recast: an explosion will occur instantly, and damage dealt will depend on the amount of time the ability was charging.

abilities.name: Shield Block
abilities.description: Raises the shield to block the first incoming attack or ability; on a successful block, can be recast to counterattack, dealing physical damage and slowing enemies.
abilities.description_client: The Crusader raises their shield and blocks the first attack or ability. If the damage has been blocked, the Crusader can recast the ability. The Crusader deals physical damage in a small area in front of them and slows all affected enemies.

abilities.name: Protection Field
abilities.description: Creates a ground field that blocks enemy teleports and dashes, reduces damage for allies inside, and disarms and damages enemies crossing its border while speeding up allies who enter.
abilities.description_client:
The Crusader creates a field on the ground. All enemies trapped in this field can't use teleporting and dashing abilities. All allies within the field take reduced damage. When enemies cross the border of the field, they will be disarmed and will take magic damage.

When the Crusader or their allies cross the border of the field, they gain bonus movement speed.

abilities.name: Mark Stun

Ideal for those who appreciate the artistry of blades, the Damascus Dagger stands as a symbol of both beauty and functionality in the realm of edged weapons.

weapons.name: Shield Warm Def 1H Scavenger
weapons.flavor: The Scavenger Shield is a rugged and resourceful defensive companion, pieced together from salvaged materials in the harsh aftermath of conflict. With a patchwork design and a sturdy construction, it provides reliable protection on the battlefield. Ideal for warriors who thrive on adaptability and resourcefulness, the Scavenger Shield stands as a testament to the resilience of those who navigate the challenges of war with ingenuity and tenacity.

weapons.name: Earthbound
weapons.flavor: The Earthbound Shield, crafted from a durable tortoise shell, is a resilient and nature-inspired defensive companion. Its sturdy construction and unique material provide a combination of flexibility and robust protection, making it an ideal choice for warriors seeking a shield that harmonizes with the strength of the earth. The Earthbound Shield stands as a symbol of grounded defense, blending natural elements with reliable durability on the battlefield.
