universal_spells.name: Cleanse
universal_spells.description: Removes negative effects (debuffs) from the caster or a targeted ally. 0 mana cost, 180 second cooldown.

universal_spells.name: Heal
universal_spells.description: Instantly restores Health equal to -10 + 30 x Hero Level + 100% Spell Power. 0 mana cost, 180 second cooldown.

universal_spells.name: Mana Burst
universal_spells.description: Instantly restores Mana equal to 10 + 10 x Hero Level + 100% Spell Power. 0 mana cost, 180 second cooldown.

params.note: restores MANA (not Health): 10 + 10 x level + 100% Spell Power

universal_spells.name: Shield
universal_spells.description: Grants a Common-quality shield that absorbs damage equal to 20 + 30 x Hero Level. 0 mana cost, 180 second cooldown.

params.note: description gives no Spell Power term -- sp_scale left null (unknown, not confirmed zero)

universal_spells.name: Sprint
universal_spells.description: Increases Movement Speed by 60% for 5 seconds. 0 mana cost, 180 second cooldown.

universal_spells.name: Warp
universal_spells.description: Instantly warps (teleports) the caster forward 5 meters. 0 mana cost, 180 second cooldown.

top_mods.note: covers both client sub-effects (e.g. physical+magical outgoing, or heal+shield output) -- applied once

choices.name: Stacking Strength
choices.description: The character deals 1/1.5/2/2.5/4% more damage for each positive effect lasting more than a minute that is active on them, up to a maximum of 5/7.5/10/12.5/20%.

condition.text: At max stacks (+1/1.5/2/2.5/3.5% per positive effect lasting >1 min, client-exact)

choices.name: Dynamic Damage Boost
choices.description: The character deals 1/1.5/2/2.5/4% more damage for each ability used within the last 10 seconds, up to a maximum of 5/7.5/10/12.5/20%.

condition.text: At max stacks (+1/1.5/2/2.5/4% per ability used within the last 10 s)

choices.name: Rampage Rush
choices.description: After entering combat, the character gains 5/6/7/8/10% damage for 10 seconds.

condition.text: For 10 s after entering combat

choices.name: Multi-Strike Mastery
choices.description: When dealing damage with an ability to more than one target, damage is increased by 2/2.5/3/3.5/5% for each additional target hit. Up to 5 targets. Lasts for 10/11/12/13/15 seconds.
choices.condition: When dealing damage with an ability to more than one target

condition.text: At max 5 targets hit (+2/2.5/3/3.5/5% per additional target; lasts 10-15 s by rank)

choices.name: Healthy Aggression
choices.description: The character deals 8% more damage when their [Health] is above 80/70/60/50/30%.

condition.text: While Health is above 80/70/60/50/30% (threshold improves with rank)

choices.name: Adrenaline Rush
choices.description: After killing an enemy, the character deals 8/10/12/14/18% more damage for 10/11/12/13/15 seconds.

condition.text: After killing an enemy (lasts 10/11/12/13/15 s)

choices.name: Executioner's Edge
choices.description: The character deals 10/12/14/16/20% more damage to targets with [Health] below 20/21/22/23/25%.

condition.text: Vs targets with Health below 20/21/22/23/25% (by rank)

choices.name: Resilient Fury
choices.description: If the character takes damage exceeding 20/19/18/17/15% of their maximum [Health] within 3 seconds, they deal 10/11/12/13/15% more damage. The effect lasts for 10/11/12/13/15 seconds.
choices.condition: If the character takes damage exceeding 20/19/18/17/15% of their maximum [Health] within 3 seconds

condition.text: After taking damage exceeding 20/19/18/17/15% of max Health within 3 s (lasts 10-15 s)

choices.name: Anti-Heal
choices.description: Damage-dealing abilities reduce the effectiveness of healing by 50/55/60/65/75% for 3 seconds.

choices.name: Fighting Spirit
choices.description: Every 2 seconds the character spends in combat, they gain 1% [Attack Power] or [Spell Power] or [Heal & Shield Power] (adaptive) (max 10/12/14/16/20%).
choices.condition: Every 2 seconds the character spends in combat

choices.name: Life Force Augmentation
choices.description: The character gains additional [Attack Power] or [Spell Power] or [Heal & Shield Power] (adaptive) equal to 0.7/0.8/0.9/1/1.2 of their maximum [Health] or [Mana] (adaptive). But only half of that bonus for ranged characters.

choices.name: Killstreak Empowerment
choices.description: For each enemy killed, the character gains 0.2% (max 10/12/14/16/20%) [Attack Power] or [Spell Power] or [Heal & Shield Power] (adaptive). All stacks are lost upon death.

choices.name: Charge Catalyst
choices.description: During combat, for each ability used by the character, allies, or enemies within a radius of 10 meters, the character gains charges for 5 seconds. At 10 charges, the next ability will deal 20/22/24/26/28% more damage.

choices.name: True Strike
choices.description: Every third basic attack deals an additional 3/3.5/4/4.5/5.5% of the target's current [Health] as True Damage.
choices.condition: Every third basic attack deals an additional 3/3

choices.name: Carnage Drive
choices.description: The character gains an additional 5/6/7/8/10% [Attack Power] or [Spell Power] or [Heal & Shield Power] (adaptive) for every 15% of their missing [Health].

choices.name: Stalwart Defender
choices.description: When the character has less than 50/55/60/65/75% [Health], he receives 15/17/19/21/25 [Armor] and 15/17/19/21/25 [Magic Resistance].
choices.condition: When the character has less than 50/55/60/65/75% [Health]

condition.text: While Health is below 50/55/60/65/75% (by rank)
While Health is below 50/55/60/65/75% (by rank)

choices.name: Retaliatory Surge
choices.description: After entering combat, the hero will reflect 20/25/30/35/45% damage of next 5 incoming auto-attacks.

choices.name: Battle-Hardened
choices.description: Every 2 seconds out of combat, the player gains 1/2/3/4/6 [Armor] and 1/2/3/4/6 [Magic Resistance] up to 15 stacks. Upon taking damage, the player loses 1 stack.

condition.text: At max 15 stacks (+1/2/3/4/6 per 2 s out of combat; lose 1 stack when hit)
At max 15 stacks (+1/2/3/4/6 per 2 s out of combat; lose 1 stack when hit)

choices.name: Shielded Defense
choices.description: Taking magic damage grants a magical shield for 10/12/14/16/20% characters maximum Health. Taking physical damage grants a physical shield for 10/12/14/16/20% characters maximum [Health]. Cooldown 3 minute.

choices.name: Protector's Presence
choices.description: [Armor] and [Magic Resistance] are increased by 5/8/11/14/20 for each ally character nearby (20 meters) the character. Maximum of 3 stacks.

condition.text: At max 3 stacks (+5/8/11/14/20 per ally within 20 m)
At max 3 stacks (+5/8/11/14/20 per ally within 20 m)

choices.name: Menacing Aura
choices.description: For each enemy nearby (20m), the character gains 3/4/5/6/10 [Armor] and 3/4/5/6/10 [Magic Resistance], up to a maximum of 6 stacks.

condition.text: At max 6 stacks (+3/4/5/6/10 per enemy within 20 m)
At max 6 stacks (+3/4/5/6/10 per enemy within 20 m)

choices.name: Bulwark
choices.description: All critical strikes dealt to the character have a reduced critical damage multiplier of 25/30/35/40/50%.

choices.name: Bouncing Back
choices.description: After being critically struck, the character gains a buff that amplifies any incoming healing by 5/6/7/8/10% (max 20/24/28/32/40%). The effect lasts for 5 seconds.

choices.name: Indomitable
choices.description: After being critically hit by an enemy, the character cannot receive critical hits for the next 3/4/5/6/8 seconds. Cooldown 15 seconds.
choices.condition: After being critically hit by an enemy

choices.name: Juggernaut
choices.description: Increases character's maximum [Health] by 10/12/14/16/20%.

choices.name: Iron Will
choices.description: Reduces the duration of crowd control effects on the character by 15/20/25/30/40%.

choices.name: Vengeful Souls
choices.description: For each enemy killed, the character gains 0.2% (max 10/12/14/16/20%) [Armor] and [Magic Resistance]. All stacks are lost upon death.

condition.text: At max kill stacks (+0.2% per enemy killed; all stacks lost on death)
At max kill stacks (+0.2% per enemy killed; all stacks lost on death)

choices.name: Last Stand
choices.description: When receiving lethal damage, the character has a 50/55/60/65/75% chance to avoid the attack. Additionally, the character regenerates 30% of their missing [Health] over 10 seconds. This effect can only occur once every 5 minutes.

choices.name: Stoic Endurance
choices.description: While under the effect of hard crowd control, the character restores 2/2.5/3/3.5/4.5% maximum [Health] per second.
choices.condition: While under the effect of hard crowd control

choices.name: Delayed Pain
choices.description: If the character's [Health] falls below 20/22/24/26/30%, all damage taken in the next 3 seconds will be absorbed and dealt over 10 seconds as a damage-over-time effect. This effect can only occur once every 5 minutes.

choices.name: Emergency Rewind
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of abilities by 10/11/12/13/15% when the character's [Health] drops below 50/60/70/80/100%.

choices.name: Mana Flow
choices.description: Increases the player's [Mana Regen] by 5/6/7/8/10% for each ability that is on cooldown.

condition.text: Per ability currently on cooldown (stacking)

choices.name: Clear Mind
choices.description: Reduces [Mana] cost of abilities by 10/12/14/16/20%.

choices.name: Mindshatter Resistance
choices.description: Ability interruption effects have a 75/80/85/90/100% reduced duration on the character.

choices.name: Slaying Momentum
choices.description: After killing an enemy, abilities on cooldown by 2/2/3/3/3 second. Do not work on criters.

choices.name: Vengeance of the Interrupted
choices.description: If the character's ability is interrupted, their next ability within 6 seconds will cost 0 resource and become stronger by 15/20/25/30/40%.
choices.condition: If the character's ability is interrupted

choices.name: Arcane Insight
choices.description: [Cooldown Reduction] of all abilities by 10/12/14/16/20%.

choices.name: Mana Siphon
choices.description: Damage dealing or healing abilities restore 2/3/4/5/7% of the damage dealt or healing done as [Mana].

choices.name: Mana Shield
choices.description: Gain a shield equal to 10/12/14/16/20% of maximum [Mana]. The shield recharges after 10 seconds out of combat.

choices.name: Maetheric Reservoir
choices.description: Increases character's maximum [Mana] by 10/12/14/16/20%.

choices.name: Aetheric Redirection
choices.description: 15/17/19/21/25% of incoming damage is redirected to [Mana] instead of [Health].

choices.name: Concentrated Power
choices.description: If the character remains stationary for 3 seconds, their abilities damage is enhanced by 15/17/19/21/25%.
choices.condition: If the character remains stationary for 3 seconds

choices.name: Temporal Rupture
choices.description: Effects that deal periodic damage do not apply periodic damage. Instead, they deal 100/105/110/115/120% of the total damage to the target when the effect duration ends.

choices.name: Chrono Cascade
choices.description: After using an ability, cooldown on your other abilities by 1/1/1/1/2 second.

choices.name: Focused Assault
choices.description: Each character's damaging ability used on the same target increases the damage of the next ability used on that same target by 4/5/6/7/9%. The effect stacks up to 5 times and lasts for 7 seconds. If an ability is used on a different target, the buff expires.

choices.name: Lurking Precision
choices.description: Increases [Physical Crit Chance] or [Magical Crit Chance] (adaptive) by 2% every 10 seconds outside of combat. Maximum 50/60/70/80/100%. The effect remains active for three seconds after dealing damage or apply healing.

condition.text: At max stacks (+2% per 10 s out of combat; persists 3 s after dealing damage or healing)

choices.name: Shadow Dance
choices.description: After using a skill, the next 3 auto-attacks have an increased [Physical Crit Chance] by 15/18/21/24/30%. Cooldown 2.5 seconds.

condition.text: On the next 3 auto-attacks after using a skill (2.5 s internal cooldown)

choices.name: Shadow Strike
choices.description: After landing a critical strike, the character gains 10/12/14/16/20% [Physical Crit Chance] or [Magical Crit Chance] (adaptive) for 10 seconds. 15 sec cooldown.

condition.text: For 10 s after landing a critical strike (15 s cooldown)

choices.name: Bloodthirsty Edge
choices.description: Killing an enemy increases flat [Physical Penetration] or [Magical Penetration] (adaptive) by 15/20/25/30/40 for 10 seconds.

condition.text: For 10 s after killing an enemy (adaptive: applies to your damage school)
For 10 s after killing an enemy (adaptive: applies to your damage school)

choices.name: Piercing Onslaught
choices.description: The character gains a stacking buff when their ability deal damage to an enemy, granting 1/2/3/4/6 flat [Physical Penetration] or [Magical Penetration] (adaptive) per stack (up to 15 stacks). Stacks last for 7 seconds.

condition.text: At max 15 stacks (+1/1.5/2/2.5/3.5 per ability hit; 7 s; adaptive school)
At max 15 stacks (+1/1.5/2/2.5/3.5 per ability hit; 7 s; adaptive school)

choices.name: Critical Affliction
choices.description: If the character deals critical damage to a target affected by their periodic damage effect, the next 3/4/5/6/8 ticks of that effect will also deal critical damage.
choices.condition: If the character deals critical damage to a target affected by their periodic damage effect

choices.name: Hunter’s Instinct
choices.description: When the character attacks an enemy alone, they gain 10/12/14/16/20% armor Penetration or [Magical Penetration] (adaptive) and deal an additional 15% [Physical Crit Power] or [Magical Crit Power] against this enemy (adaptive) for 5 seconds. Cooldown is 20 seconds.
choices.condition: When the character attacks an enemy alone

condition.text: When attacking an enemy alone (5 s duration, 20 s cooldown)
When attacking an enemy alone (5 s duration, 20 s cooldown)

choices.name: Backstab
choices.description: The character gains 10/12/14/16/20% armor Penetration or [Magical Penetration] (adaptive) and deals 15% additional [Physical Crit Power] or [Magical Crit Power] (adaptive) to enemies when attacking them from behind.

condition.text: When attacking the enemy from behind
When attacking the enemy from behind

choices.name: Surprise Attack
choices.description: When the character disappears using camouflage or invisibility from the enemy's sight for 2 seconds during combat, their next ability or auto-attack gains an additional 30/40/50/60/80% [Physical Crit Chance] or [Magical Crit Chance] (adaptive).
choices.condition: When the character disappears using camouflage or invisibility from the enemy's sight for 2 seconds during combat

condition.text: On the next ability or auto-attack after breaking stealth during combat

choices.name: Ghostly Reflexes
choices.description: The character can notice every stealth activation within a 30/35/40/45/55-meter radius. Cooldown 30 seconds

choices.name: Giant Slayer
choices.description: If the character attacks an enemy with maximum [Health] greater than the character's own (3x for monsters), the enemy receives 10/12/14/16/20% increased damage from the character.
choices.condition: If the character attacks an enemy with maximum [Health] greater than the character's own (3x for monsters)

condition.text: Vs enemies whose max Health exceeds yours (3x for monsters)

choices.name: Blade Fury
choices.description: When landing a critical strike, the character deals an additional 50/55/60/65/75% of the damage to surrounding enemies within 2.5 meters.

choices.name: Critstacker
choices.description: Non-critical auto-attacks grant a buff that increases the chance of [Physical Crit Chance] or [Magical Crit Chance] (adaptive) by 1/2/3/4/6% for 5 seconds, which are consumed upon landing a critical strike. The effect can stack up to 100%.

choices.name: Blade Master
choices.description: When the character scores a critical hit, they gain a stack of Blade Master. At 5 stacks, their next ability deals 20/25/30/35/45% increased damage and consumes all stacks.
choices.condition: When the character scores a critical hit

choices.name: Disruptive Strike
choices.description: Enemy can not use dash abilities for 3 seconds after player deals damage that exceeds 30/28/26/24/20% of the enemy's maximum [Health] within 5 seconds.

choices.name: Heroic Surge
choices.description: When the character's [Health] drops below 50/55/60/65/75%, their [Attack Speed] is increased by 10/11/12/13/15%.

choices.name: Relentless Assault
choices.description: Auto-attacks against the same target increase the character's [Attack Speed] by 0.8/0.9/1/1/1.1/1.3% (stacking up to 20 times). But only half of that bonus for ranged characters. The effect lasts for 3 seconds and is reset when the character changes target.

condition.text: At max 20 stacks vs the same target (+0.8/0.9/1.0/1.1/1.3% per auto; halved for ranged; resets on target switch)

choices.name: Swift Onslaught
choices.description: After entering combat, the character gains 10/12/14/16/20% [Attack Speed] bonus for 10 seconds.

choices.name: Feline Reflexes
choices.description: Increases[Movement Speed] by 10/12/14/16/20% for 5 seconds after using dash abilities.

choices.name: Leaps and Bounds
choices.description: After suffering movement-impairing effects, the character's [Movement Speed] is increased by 10/12/14/16/20% for 5 seconds.

condition.text: For 5 s after suffering a movement-impairing effect

choices.name: Unshackled
choices.description: Gain immunity to movement-impairing effects for 3/4/5/6/8 second after using a dash ability.

choices.name: Explorer's Instinct
choices.description: Grants the character a stacking 1/1.2/1.4/1.6/2% [Movement Speed] buff for every 10 seconds out of combat, up to a maximum of 10/12/14/16/20%. Do not work with mounts.

choices.name: Predator's Vigor
choices.description: The character can sense wounded targets below 30/35/40/45/55% [Health] within a large radius. Does not sense targets within a 20-meter radius. Activates once every 30 seconds.

choices.name: Escape Artist
choices.description: If the character's [Health] drops below 15/17/19/21/25%, all immobilization effects are removed. Cooldown is 60 seconds.

choices.name: Surge of Speed
choices.description: If the character takes damage exceeding 30/28/26/24/20% of their maximum [Health] within 2 seconds, their [Attack Speed] increases by 20/24/28/32/40% for 10 seconds. At talent level 5, it also disables the attack speed cap restriction, allowing you to exceed it while active.
choices.condition: If the character takes damage exceeding 30/28/26/24/20% of their maximum [Health] within 2 seconds

choices.name: Small But Mighty
choices.description: If the character attacks an enemy with maximum [Health] greater than the character's own (3x for monsters), the character gains a 20/24/28/32/40% increase in [Attack Speed] against this target. But only half of that bonus for ranged characters.
choices.condition: If the character attacks an enemy with maximum [Health] greater than the character's own (3x for monsters)

condition.text: Vs enemies whose max Health exceeds yours (3x for monsters); halved for ranged

choices.name: Thrill of the Hunt
choices.description: For each enemy killed, the character gains 0.2% (max 10/12/14/16/20%) [Attack Speed]. All stacks are lost upon death.

choices.name: Sniper's Precision
choices.description: Increases damage depending on the distance to the target. Damage is increased by 1.5/1.7/1.9/2.1/2.5% for each meter, starting from 3 meters away.

choices.name: Reach Mastery
choices.description: For each skill used, the character gains charges. Upon reaching 5/5/5/5/3 charges, the next skill will gain 5/6/7/8/8 meters to its range of application.

choices.name: Stationary Marksman
choices.description: If the character remains stationary for 3 seconds, their [Attack Speed] is increased by 20/24/28/32/40%. But only half of that bonus for ranged characters.
choices.condition: If the character remains stationary for 3 seconds

condition.text: After remaining stationary for 3 s (halved for ranged)

top_mods.note: covers both client sub-effects (e.g. physical+magical outgoing, or heal+shield output) -- applied once

choices.name: Luminescent Grace
choices.description: Increases healing and shielding effectiveness by 10/12/14/16/20% when the character's [Mana] is above 80/75/70/65/55%.

condition.text: While Mana is above 80/77/74/71/65% (by rank, client-exact)

choices.name: Serene Respite
choices.description: If the character has not used any healing or shielding abilities for 10 seconds, their next healing or shielding ability will be 3/4/5/6/8% stronger up to 15%.
choices.condition: If the character has not used any healing or shielding abilities for 10 seconds

choices.name: Harmonic Trade-off
choices.description: Increases healing and shielding by 20/25/30/35/45%, but reduces damage by 20/25/30/35/45%.

choices.name: Symbiotic Mending
choices.description: Healing a target also heals the character for 10/12/14/16/20% of the amount healed.

choices.name: Critical Attunement
choices.description: Critical healing applies a healing-over-time effect to a target for 10 seconds, equivalent to 15/17/19/21/25% of the amount healed.

choices.name: Aegis Retribution
choices.description: Critical healing applies a shield to a target for 10 seconds, equivalent to 10/12/14/16/20% of the amount healed.

choices.name: Purifying Rejuvenation
choices.description: When removing a negative effect, restores 15/17/19/21/25% of the missing [Health] to the target over 5 seconds.

choices.name: Benevolent Echoes
choices.description: Increases healing and shielding by 4/5/6/7/9% for every unique target healed or shielded within the last 10 seconds (max 12/15/18/21/27%).

condition.text: At the unique-target maximum (+4/5/6/7/9% per unique target healed/shielded in the last 10 s)

choices.name: Shield Master
choices.description: The player's shield-applying abilities now have 0/3/6/9/9% charges. Upgrade bonus - increase shielding done on 2/2/2/2/3.

choices.name: Chrono-Fortification
choices.description: The duration of shields applied by the hero increased by 100/120/140/160/200%.

choices.name: Overflowing Barrier
choices.description: 20% of the hero's overhealing becomes a shield (maximum Shield strength is equal to 10/12/14/16/20% of the target's maximum [Health]) for 10 seconds.

choices.name: Cleansing Touch
choices.description: Removes a negative effect from a nearby ally with the lowest [Health] every 30/27/24/21/15 seconds.

choices.name: Mystic Transference
choices.description: Healing an ally increases the effectiveness of next damaging ability by 15/17/19/21/25%. Damaging an enemy with ability increases the effectiveness of next healing ability by 15/17/19/21/25%.

choices.name: Ultima Resonance
choices.description: Using the ultimate ability reduces the cost of healing abilities by 25/30/35/40/50% for 20 seconds.

choices.name: Focus Healing
choices.description: Each character's healing or shielding used on the same target increases the healing and shielding used on that same target by 5/6/7/8/10%. The effect stacks up to 5 times and lasts for 15 seconds. If an ability is used on a different target, the buff expires.

condition.text: At max 5 stacks on the same target (+5/6/7/8/10% per consecutive heal/shield; 15 s)

choices.name: Wanderer's Resolve
choices.description: The character gains 10/12/14/16/20% damage reduction when no allies are nearby.

choices.name: Self-Sustenance
choices.description: If there are no allies nearby, the character receives [Health Regen] equal to 0.5/0.6/0.7/0.8/1% of their maximum [Health] per second for 20 seconds after exiting combat.
choices.condition: If there are no allies nearby

choices.name: Lone Wolf
choices.description: When there are no allied character nearby, the character gains 10/12/14/16/20% increased damage.
choices.condition: When there are no allied character nearby

choices.name: Rejuvenating Essence
choices.description: [Health Regen] and [Mana Regen] received from consumables is increased by 20/24/28/32/40%, and their [Cooldown Reduction] by 50%.

choices.name: Resourceful Explorer
choices.description: Upon killing an enemy, the character restores 3/4/5/6/8% of their maximum [Health] and [Mana].

choices.name: Eldritch Transmutation
choices.description: When using alchemy consumables, gain a 10/12/14/16/20% damage boost and 10/12/14/16/20% incoming damage reduction for 20 seconds.

choices.name: Cozy Campfires
choices.description: All campfires have an invisibility detection effect within a 15/17/19/21/25-meter radius.

choices.name: Flame Forged
choices.description: After using a "campfire" the character receives a buff that increases the character's primary attribute by 10/12/14/16/20% (adaptive) for 10 minutes.
choices.condition: After using a "campfire" the character receives a buff that increases the character's primary attribute by 10/12/14/16/20% (adaptive) for 10 minutes

choices.name: Firestarter
choices.description: Create campfires with just two pieces of wood and no matches. Upgrade bonus: increases satiety effect duration by 0/20/40/60/100%.

choices.name: Desperate Escape
choices.description: If the character's [Health] drops below 15/17/19/21/25%, the hero becomes invisible for 1.5 seconds. Can only activate once every 180 seconds.

choices.name: Sneak Prevention
choices.description: The character cannot be approached unnoticed, therefore all effects of attacks from behind and from invisibility do not work. Upgrade bonus Decrease damage from behind and invisibility for 0/4/8/12/20%.

choices.name: Slow and Steady
choices.description: Able to detect wards. Activates once every 180/160/140/120/80 seconds. Increases ward detection tool duration and [Vision Range] by 50% and cooldodwn by 50%.

choices.name: Guardian of the Wild
choices.description: Upon taking lethal damage, the character survives at 1 [Health] and granted a shield equal to 30/35/40/45/55% of their maximum [Health] for 10 seconds. This effect can only occur once every 5 minutes.

choices.name: Solo Survivor's Hunger
choices.description: When there are no allies nearby and the character's [Health] drops below 80%/50%/20%, they gain 2/2.2/2.4/2.6/3% / 3/3.5/4/4.5/6% / 4/5/6/7/9% [Vamp (Lifesteal/Ability Steal, adaptive)].
choices.condition: When there are no allies nearby and the character's [Health] drops below 80%/50%/20%

choices.name: Duration Enhancement System
choices.description: All positive effects 1 minute duration or more on the character stronger by 30/35/40/45/55% and last 50% longer.

choices.name: Aura of Ferocity
choices.description: Increases the outgoing damage of character and nearby allies by 5/6/7/8/10%. (Works only if allies are nearby).

choices.name: Warden's Protection
choices.description: Character and nearby allies receive 5/6/7/8/10% reduced damage from all sources. (Works only if allies are nearby).

condition.text: Only while allies are nearby
Only while allies are nearby

choices.name: Empowering Presence
choices.description: Character and nearby allies receive 5/6/7/8/10% [Movement Speed]. (Works only if allies are nearby).

condition.text: Only while allies are nearby

choices.name: Energized Bastion
choices.description: Shields applied by the character grant the target 10/12/14/16/20% [Attack Speed] for the shield's duration.

condition.text: On shielded targets while the shield holds (self-shields included)

choices.name: Dynamic Fortress
choices.description: Shields applied by the character grant the target 10/12/14/16/20% [Armor] or [Magic Resistance] (adaptive) for the shield's duration.

choices.name: Mana Savior
choices.description: If the character interrupts an enemy's ability, restores 5/6/7/8/10% maximum [Mana] to the ally with the lowest [Mana] level.
choices.condition: If the character interrupts an enemy's ability

choices.name: Coordinated Assault Tactic
choices.description: Character's abilities apply a charge to the target. Upon reaching 3 charges, an auto-attack from an ally against the target will stun it for 2/2/2/3/3 second.

choices.name: Hard Control Expert
choices.description: When the character hits a target with hard crowd control, after the effect expires, the target gets marked. An auto-attack from an ally against the marked target will heal the ally for 10/12/14/16/20% of their maximum [Health].
choices.condition: When the character hits a target with hard crowd control

choices.name: Weakening Curse
choices.description: Enemies affected by the character's movement-impairing abilities deal 15/17/19/21/25% reduced damage for the duration of the effect.

choices.name: Sentinel's Embrace
choices.description: Grant character and nearby allies a 10/11/12/13/15% increase to their primary attribute. (Works only if allies are nearby).

choices.name: Amplified Efficiency Matrix
choices.description: All positive effects applied by the character with a duration of 1 minute or more become 15/17/19/21/25% stronger.

choices.name: Battle Intuition
choices.description: Doubles the maximum number of wards the character can place. Wards last three times as long and provide 50/60/70/80/80% more [Vision Range].

choices.name: Amplify Weakness
choices.description: Damaging abilities apply a mark to enemies for 5 seconds, increasing their damage taken from all allies by 10/11/12/13/15%.

condition.text: Vs enemies marked by your damaging abilities (mark lasts 5 s)

choices.name: Mark of Vampirism
choices.description: Direct damage abilities apply a mark to the enemy for 5 seconds. Damage dealt to the marked target grants the hero's allies vampirism equal to 5/6/7/8/10% of the damage dealt.

choices.name: Radiant Ascension
choices.description: Using the ultimate ability grants character and nearby allies invulnerability for 1/1.25/1.5/1.75/2.5 second. Cooldown 20. After you get an effect, the next one can only be obtained after 20 seconds. (Works only if allies are nearby).

talent_trees.name: Farmer
talent_trees.note: present in client data, not selectable in-game

choices.description: Increase {{EffectCreator.Effect.nm}}.

choices.name: Increased resources drop
choices.description: Increase {{EffectCreator.Effect.nm}}.

system.reset_note: Talents are reset at an NPC ("teacher"). During the current test phase, passive-talent teachers are limited to selling consumables for resetting talents (simplified functionality). In early access this will expand, and "the cost of resetting talents will increase each time" -- stated developer goal is to make resets "accessible but thoughtful actions."

t3_gear_perks.detail: Upgraded and Overclocked are the two enhancement stages available on any permanent Tier 3 item (a universal system also used for chip slots / secondary stats on other gear). Specifically for T3 WEAPONS: an Upgraded T3 weapon carries 1 enhanced weapon-specialization talent, and an Overclocked T3 weapon carries 2. Each such talent instance on the weapon boosts that specific weapon talent's level by +1 (stacking with points invested via normal XP progression), and a single weapon talent can be boosted up to level 3 total this way.

system.non_linear_note: Confirmed by official news #306: "you can progress along skill branches not just linearly from left to right but also downward, upward, diagonally, or even backward" -- an explicit design change from an earlier, presumably linear, version.
system.edge_cost_note: every mastery edge purchase costs exactly 1 point (empirically verified across 52/52 buys in the reference builder)

champion/destroyer.description: Melee heroes with a specialization in two-handed weapons. They sweep right into a battle, dealing massive damage. Fighting in a group, they can support allies restoring their health.

nodes.name: Disrupting Blow
nodes.description: When hit, the skill <ctrl>interrupts</ctrl> the cast.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Disables <ctrl>dash</ctrl> abilities for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Hamstring Cut
nodes.description: Enemies affected by the ability experience a <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> <ctrl>slowing</ctrl> effect for 5 seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: +<w>1.5</w> second to <ctrl>Root</ctrl>.

nodes.name: Health Shatterer
nodes.description: The ability deals <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> more damage to enemies with full HPMax.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>The Charge</w> applies <w>7</w> seconds of Bleed to enemies with full HPMax, which deals <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}}=[(20%)AttackPower] physical damage</pd> per second.

nodes.name: Accumulating Power
nodes.description: For each target hit by the ability, the next attack of the Destroyer increases by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>. (Maximum <w>{{Data.0.ACP4}}</w>).
nodes.level_bonus_text: This attack deals splash damage.

nodes.name: Quick Reprisal
nodes.description: If the Destroyer hits an opponent, the ability can be reused within <w>10</w> seconds. It performs a short lunge forward, dealing <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}} = [({{Data.0.ACP2}})AttackPower] physical damage</pd> in front of the character. If the Destroyer grazes an enemy with the <w>edge</w> of the blade it deals an additional <md>{{Data.0.ADF2}}</md> = [<w>40</w> + <sp>{{Data.0.ACP4}}</sp> SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: +<w>1</w> charge of this ability.

nodes.name: Chargedrive
nodes.description: For each opponent hit by the ability, the Destroyer gains a charge for the passive skill (up to a maximum of <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> charges per strike).
nodes.level_bonus_text: Apply a debuff that makes the target take additional damage +<w>10%</w> from all source for <w>4</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Timecut
nodes.description: For each opponent hit, the ability's <cdr>cooldown</cdr> is reduced by <w>0.5</w> second (maximum reduction - <w>{{Data.0.AV3}}</w> seconds per single use of the ability).
nodes.level_bonus_text: Circle Strike now generates a brief vortex on impact, pulling all enemies from a short 1 meter distance toward the Destroyer.

nodes.name: Epicenter
nodes.description: Opponents in the center of the area will be <ctrl>rooted</ctrl> for <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Hitting enemies grants a stacking buff (+5%)AttackSpeed per enemy hit for 5 seconds, up to a maximum of <w>+30%</w>.

nodes.name: Cure Edge
nodes.description: The Destroyer restores HPMax equal to <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of the damage dealt when hitting opponents on the edge of the area of effect.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Increases all Bleed damage on target for <w>20%</w> for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Blade Throw
nodes.description:
The Destroyer throws their weapon in the chosen direction, dealing <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}}</pd> = [(<w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>)AttackPower] <pd>physical damage</pd>.

Ability can be used upon holding Shift.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Thrown weapon passes through enemies and gain <w>20%</w> PercentArmorPenetrationBonus.

nodes.name: Endless Empowerment
nodes.description: Increases the duration of the buff by <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Chosen target gets <ctrl>fear</ctrl> for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Self-сonfidence
nodes.description: Increases the bonus AttackPower and bonus HPMax gained by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: While the buff is active, the Destroyer’s auto-attacks apply a 1-second 5% <ctrl>slow</ctrl> (stacking up to 10 times).

nodes.name: Thunderous Roar
nodes.description: The ability becomes AoE: In the area of effect, enemies lose <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of Armor and Resist for 5 seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Disarm for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Commanding Shout
nodes.description: The Destroyer becomes enraged and gains <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> Tenacity for 5 seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Gain a brief <w>immunity</w> to <ctrl>slowing</ctrl> effects for 5 seconds each time you activate <w>War Cry</w>.

nodes.name: Unchained
nodes.description: Removes all <ctrl>slowing</ctrl> effects. Nearby allies also gain the enhancement effects.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Nearby allies have these effects cleansed.

nodes.name: Ronin's Stoicism
nodes.description: During the ability's duration, the Destroyer takes <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> less damage.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If you hit at least <w>3</w> enemies during <w>Battle Frenzy</w>, gain a temporary <shield>{{Data.0.ADF}} = [(10%)HPMax] shield</shield> for 10 seconds afterward.

nodes.name: Unbound Mobility
nodes.description: During the ability's duration, the Destroyer gains <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> resistance to <ctrl>slowing</ctrl> effects.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>Immunity</w> to <ctrl>root</ctrl> effects while ability is active.

nodes.name: Sudden Death
nodes.description: For each target hit by the ability, the Destroyer gains <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> MoveSpeedFinalKPositive.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If you hit the same enemy at least 3 times <w>Battle Frenzy</w>, apply a “Hamstring” effect that reduces their MoveSpeedFinalKPositive by <w>30%</w> for 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Armor Grinder
nodes.description: Enemies damaged by the ability lose <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> Armor for <w>3</w> seconds. The effect can stack up to 6 times.
nodes.level_bonus_text: At 6 stacks, the target is also inflicted with a short 1-second vulnerability taking <w>+10%</w> damage from all sources.

nodes.name: Whirling Booster
nodes.description: Increases the duration of the ability by <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If you maintain spin for its full duration, you regain 5 ability stacks immediately afterward (allowing you to quickly re-stack up to 10 if you keep fighting).

nodes.name: Shockwave Recoil
nodes.description: The ability now deals an additional <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>200</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP4}})SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md>. Upon landing, all enemies within <w>2</w> meters outside of the damage radius are <ctrl>knocked back</ctrl> and Destroyer receives <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> SlowResistance for <w>3</w> seconds. Ability range and radius are increased by <w>2</w> meters.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Enemies receive 2 second <ctrl>stun</ctrl> after knockback.

nodes.name: Dead Vacuum
nodes.description: <w>The ability is replaced with:</w> The area of effect is expanded by <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> meters. The Destroyer pulls nearby enemies towards him, dealing <pd>physical damage</pd> and <ctrl>rooting</ctrl> them for <w>3</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Apply Bleed to all enemies with effect, dealing <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}}=[(40%)AttackPower] physical damage</pd> per second.

edges.effect_text: +0.25% to the strength of all buff effects.

champion/ranger.description: Use bows and arrows. Toggling between two stances they can deal damage in an area or to a particular target. They can be the ones to deal the most damage, and can root and slow enemies.

nodes.name: Binding net
nodes.description: The net becomes denser and restricts movement. For those affected by the skill, AttackSpeed is reduced by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>, and the casting speed of abilities is also decreased by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <pcp>Disarms</pcp> target for <w>3</w> seconds

nodes.name: Speedstalker
nodes.description: If the ability affects an opponent who is under the <w>acceleration</w> buff, the target receives additional <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> damage.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <ctrl>Stuns</ctrl> a target for <w>2</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Corrosive Restraint
nodes.description: The net becomes acidic, during the <ctrl>immobilization</ctrl> effect, the target's Armor and Resist are reduced by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> each second for <w>5</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Hitting an enemy with <w>Net Shot</w> <pcp>marks</pcp> them, causing the Ranger’s attacks to deal extra <w>15%</w> damage to that target for the extended duration of <w>Net Shot</w>, starting from <w>3</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Backline Snare
nodes.description: The ability also <ctrl>immobilizes</ctrl> one <w>additional</w> enemy located <w>3</w> meters behind the primary target.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If <w>Net Shot</w> misses entirely, <w>50%</w> of its <cdri><cdr>Cooldown</cdr> is refunded.

nodes.name: Inferno Arrow
nodes.description:
If the ability immobilizes an opponent, the skill can be reused within the next <w>5</w> seconds - the Ranger charges up a fiery arrow in the specified direction for <w>0.4</w> seconds. Range of this arrow is affected by the charging time - from <w>min 4</w> meters up to <w>12 max</w>. The Ranger can hold the shot for up to <w>1</w> second after the ability is fully charged. The arrow deals <w><pd>{{Data.0.ADF}} physical damage</pd></w> = [<w>({{Data.0.ACP2}})AttackPower</w>] on initial hit. On impact, it <shieldpd>explodes</shieldpd> in a fiery cone behind the target dealing <w><md>{{Data.0.ADF2}}</md></w> = [<w>{{Data.0.AC1}}</w> + ({{Data.0.AVk2}})SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md>.

<mp>Mana</mp> cost is increased by <w>10%</w> of your SpellPower.
Scales from <w>Net Shot</w> ability Level.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Targets damaged by arrow or fiery cone receive <md>{{Data.0.ADF3}} magic damage</md> = [<w>{{Data.0.AV3}}</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP4}})SpellPower] each second for <w>3</w> seconds. Enemies <ctrl>immobilized</ctrl> by <w>Net Shot</w> ability are <shieldpd>ignited</shieldpd> for <w>6</w> seconds, but <ctrl>root</ctrl> fades after 0.5 seconds.

nodes.name: Area Marksmanship
nodes.description: The Ability now applies <w>Harpoon Arrows</w> on impact: <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Arrows have explosive tips and <shieldpd>detonate</shieldpd> <w>2</w> seconds later, dealing <w>50%</w> of the main ability’s damage. That <shieldpd>explosion</shieldpd> triggers <w>Acid Cloud</w> detonation if effect is active.

nodes.name: Focal Point
nodes.description: The radius of the ability is increased by <w>1</w> meter. Enemies caught in the <w>center</w> of the impact zone take <w>{{Data.0.ACP3}}</w> increased damage.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>Arrow Rain</w> leaves behind a barbed arrow field for <w>5</w> seconds, <ctrl>slowing</ctrl> all enemies who pass through it <w>by 50%</w>.

nodes.name: Mobility Suppression
nodes.description: Enemies within the area of effect are <ctrl>grounded</ctrl> and unable to use movement abilities <w>for 3 seconds</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Enemies hit by <w>Arrow Rain</w> become <pcp>crippled</pcp>, reducing their damage dealt <w>by 15%</w> for <w>4</w> seconds due to the overwhelming suppressive fire.

nodes.name: Dual Capacity
nodes.description: The skill gains <w>one additional charge</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>Arrow Rain</w> <pcp>marks</pcp> all enemies struck, causing them to take <w>10%</w> increased damage from all sources for <w>5</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Acidic Barrage
nodes.description: The Ranger uses acid arrows and leaves an acidic cloud in the area of effect for <w>3</w> seconds. Enemies within the area receive <md>{{Data.0.ADF2}}</md> = [<w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP3}})SpellPower] <md>magic damage</w> each second. If the arrow with <w>Venomous Infusion</w> poison effect hits the cloud, damage is doubled. If the <w>Acidic Cloud</w> connects with <shieldpd>fire</shieldpd> the area will <shieldpd>explode</shieldpd> for <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>{{Data.0.AV3}}</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP4}})SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md>. The damage from Acidic Mist is considered damage over time (DoT).
nodes.level_bonus_text: If inside the cloud, the target is also <ctrl>silenced</w> due to the toxic fumes.

nodes.name: Armor Penetration Expertise
nodes.description: While the Ranger is in the <w>Standard Stance</w>, he ignores <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of the target's Armor for each lodged arrow.
nodes.level_bonus_text: While in <w>Standard Stance</w> continuously for at least <w>3</w> seconds, the Ranger gains a stacking <w>+1</w> damage bonus on basic attacks <w>up to 30</w>.

nodes.name: Multishot Mastery
nodes.description: While the Ranger is in the barrage stance, all targets receive <w>15%</w> more damage.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Arrows fired in <w>Barrage Stance</w> now splinter on impact, causing a small (1 meter) secondary <w>AoE</w> burst around each target hit, dealing <pd>{{Data.0.AC1}}</pd> = [(50%)AttackPower] <pd>physical damage</pd>.

nodes.name: Stance Switcher
nodes.description: Upon switching to the <w>Standard Stance</w>, the next auto-attack <pcp>disarms</pcp> the target for <w>{{Data.0.AC5}}</w> seconds. Upon switching to the <w>Barrage Stance</w>, the next auto-attack <ctrl>knocks back</ctrl> enemies by <w>{{Data.0.AC4}}</w> meters.
nodes.level_bonus_text: After switching stances, the Ranger gains a <w>20%</w> MoveSpeedFinalKPositive bonus for <w>2</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Silver Arrow
nodes.description: Every 5th shot deals <w>5%</w> of the opponent's current <hp>Health</hp> as <md>magic damage</md>. This effect works with reduced efficiency against monsters and bosses.
nodes.level_bonus_text: After two stance switches within <w>10</w> seconds, Ranger enters <armat>Perfect Stance</armat> for <w>5 seconds</w> and benefits from <w>both stances</w>.

nodes.name: Venomous Infusion
nodes.description:
The Ranger coats the arrow with poison over <w>0.5 seconds (shift E)</w>. Can be casted while moving. After the arrow is coated, the Ranger can release the arrow in the desired direction within <w>3</w> seconds. The poison arrow deals <w><pd>{{Data.0.ADF}} physical damage</pd></w> = [(120%)AttackPower)] and applies a <hpow>poison</hpow> effect to the target it hits, dealing <w><md>{{Data.0.ADF2}} magic damage</md></w> = [<w>{{Data.0.AV}}</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})SpellPower] each second over <w>3</w> seconds. If the <w>Poison Arrow</w> hits an <w>Acidic Net</w>, the effect of the net corrodes armor even further, applying a debuff that reduces Armor and Resist by <w>30%</w> for <w>5</w> seconds. If the <w>Poison Arrow</w> hits an <w>Acidic Cloud</w>, the effect and duration of the cloud are doubled.

<mp>Mana</mp> cost is increased by <w>10%</w> of your SpellPower.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Applies stacking <pcp>heal reduction</pcp> effect, which reduces incoming <heal>healing</heal> by <w>10%</w> per stack for next <w>3</w> seconds, can reach maximum of <w>7</w> stacks.

nodes.name: Arrow Chaser
nodes.description: The Ranger moves <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> faster when moving towards a target with <w>5</w> or more arrows.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Targets with maximum <w>Harpoon Arrow</w> stacks <ctrl>slowed</ctrl> by <w>10%</w>.

nodes.name: Follow-up Shaft
nodes.description: Increases the chance a target will be hit by an <w>additional arrow</w> by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Target will be hit by <w>2 additional arrows</w> instead.

nodes.name: Vital Quiver Restoration
nodes.description: Upon activating the ability, the Ranger restores <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> <hp>maximum Health</hp> for each arrow.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>Harpoon Arrows</w> <shieldpd>explosion radius</shieldpd> (around each enemy with arrows) is increased by <w>3</w> meters, hitting other nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Mana Drain Barrage
nodes.description: If a target has the maximum amount of <w>Harpoon Arrows</w> stacked, they will slowly drain <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> <mpi><mp>Mana</mp> per arrow per second.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Detonating arrows steal <mpi><mp>Mana</mp> from the target. in equivalent of <w>10%</w> from damage dealt.

nodes.name: Hexashot Enhancement
nodes.description:
At <w>6</w> stacks of the <w>Harpoon Arrows</w>, the Archer's auto-attacks deal additional <md>{{Data.0.AC1}} magic damage</md> = [<w>50</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})SpellPower].
Each Auto-attack extends the <w>Venomous Infusion</w> <hpow>poison</hpow> duration by <w>1 second</w>. While this talent is active, each empowered auto-attack consumes 5 MPBonus.
nodes.level_bonus_text: When the target is under <w>Venomous Infusion</w>, <w>Corrosive Restraint</w> or <w>Acidic Barrage</w> effects damage increases to <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>100</w> base damage + (80%)SpellPower] <md>magical damage</md>.

nodes.name: Fire Volley
nodes.description: The ranger unleashes a cone of fiery arrows. Upon impact <w>at the edge of the cone</w>, a fiery wall erupts, searing enemies that pass through it. Enemies passing through it take <md>{{Data.0.ADF}} magical damage</md> = [<w>70</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})SpellPower] each second and <shieldpd>ignite</shieldpd>, receiving <md>{{Data.0.ADF2}} magical damage</md> = [<w>15</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP4}})SpellPower] each second for <w>10</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: The Ranger releases <w>two</w> walls of <shieldpd>fire</shieldpd> instead of one.

nodes.name: Blaze Rebounder
nodes.description:
After a successful rebound, the ability can be activated again during the next <w>20</w> seconds. After a brief wind-up, The Ranger launches a <w>Fire Arrow</w>. If it strikes an enemy, the target takes <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}} physical damage</pd> = [(200%)AttackPower]. The arrow then <shieldpd>explodes</shieldpd> in a <w>4</w>-meter radius, dealing <md>{{Data.0.ADF2}} magic damage</md> = [<w>250</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP1}})SpellPower] to all enemies caught in the blast. 

<mp>Mana</mp> cost is increased by <w>10%</w> of your SpellPower.
Scales from <w>Saltation</w> ability Level.
nodes.level_bonus_text: The <shieldpd>explosion</shieldpd> leaves behind a scorching pool of fire, inflicting an additional \n<md>{{Data.0.ADF3}}</md> = [<w>100</w> + (65%)SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md> per second for <w>5</w> seconds to anyone standing in it.

edges.name: Harpoon Arrows
edges.effect_text: +1% to attack speed bonus on 6 arrows.
