champion/defender.description: Tanks who use swords and shields in melee fights. They can withstand lots of incoming damage and help reduce damage to allies. They taunt enemies to take the most damage and attacks.

nodes.name: Swift Legs
nodes.description: After using the skill, the defender's MoveSpeed increases by <w>10%</w> for <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: The target’s MoveSpeed is also reduced by <w>10%</w> after being hit for 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Prolonged Protection
nodes.description: The <w>Offensive Fortitude</w> effect extends by <w>{{Data.0.AC4}}</w> seconds after each basic attack (Maximum + 20 seconds).
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>Offensive Fortitude</w> max stacks increased by 2.

nodes.name: Sluggish Discipline
nodes.description: The empowered attack also slows the target’s AttackSpeedFinalK by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>Empowered Strike</w> severely weakens the enemy: the target deals <w>10%</w> less damage after being hit for 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Splash Wave
nodes.description: The empowered attack now cleaves, hitting up to <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> additional nearby enemies for <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of the original damage.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>Empowered Strike</w> generates 2x normal threat.

nodes.name: Blademaster
nodes.description: The skill becomes a <w>3</w>-hit combo. Each combo hit deals <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}}</pd> = [<w>{{Data.0.AC1}}</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})AttackPower] <pd>physical damage</pd>. There must be no more than <w>2</w> seconds between hits, otherwise the combo will be interrupted. After the first hit, the second hit is <w>10%</w> stronger, the third hit is <w>20%</w> stronger. The next auto-attack after each combo hit deals an additional <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> damage (this buff lasts for <w>2</w> seconds).
nodes.level_bonus_text: Third attack will knock targets up in the air.

nodes.name: Light Steps
nodes.description: While the Defender is without a shield, their MoveSpeed increases by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: When the shield returns to the Defender, it projects a damage reduction aura for 3 seconds (<w>20%</w> less damage taken) to the Defender and allies.

nodes.name: Roll-out maneuver
nodes.description: If the Defender misses the skill, they can roll towards the shield and pick it up within a <w>{{Data.0.AV}}</w> meter range.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Receive a <w>30%</w> bonus to the MoveSpeed for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Shield bash
nodes.description: For <w>4</w> seconds after hitting a target with a skill, the Defender can strike with their shield. The strike hits all enemies in front in a semicircle, <ctrl>knocks them back</ctrl> by <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> meter, and <ctrl>stuns</ctrl> for <w>1</w> second (this <ctrl>stun</ctrl> does not trigger diminishing returns on crowd control). Resets the auto-attack.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>Shield Bash</w> generates 2x normal threat.

nodes.name: Front Kick
nodes.description: For <w>4</w> seconds after hitting a target with <w>Shield Throw</w> or <w>Shield Bash</w>, the Defender can kick the target, knocking them back by <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> meter and <ctrl>stunning</ctrl> them (this stun does not trigger diminishing returns on crowd control). Resets the auto-attack.
nodes.level_bonus_text: After the <ctrl>knockback</ctrl>, enemy loses balance and <ctrl>slow down</ctrl> by <w>50%</w> for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Intervene
nodes.description:
If the skill is used on an ally, the Defender jumps to them and shields them by taking a defensive stance. The Defender will redirect <w>50%</w> of incoming damage from that ally to themselves for the next <w>{{Data.0.AV}}</w> seconds.
Press Shift+W.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Receive a <shield>(15%)HPMax shield</shield> for <w>6</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Commanding Cry
nodes.description: Increases the taunt radius by <w>1</w> meter. Also reduces incoming Main Attack Damage by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> for taunt duration.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Defender reflects <w>50 + (2%)HPMax</w> damage each auto-attack.

nodes.name: Leg Day
nodes.description: Increases jump distance by <w>{{Data.0.AV}}</w> meters.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Receive a <w>20%</w> bonus to the MoveSpeed for 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Sweeping Strike
nodes.description: Attack becomes a semicircular sword strike, dealing <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}} = [<w>{{Data.0.AC1}}</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})AttackPower] physical damage</pd>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Increases the damage of the attack by +10% for each target that was hit.

nodes.name: Shield Block
nodes.description: For each enemy affected by the <ctrl>taunt</ctrl>, the Defender gains a <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> increased BlockMainAttackChance, up to a maximum of <w>{{Data.0.ACP4}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: BlockMainAttackPercent is increased by <w>30%</w> for buff duration.

nodes.name: Intimidator
nodes.description: While enemies are affected by the taunt, the Defender can unleash a loud battle cry, causing taunted enemies around them to flee in fear for <w>1</w> second. The duration of the <ctrl>fear</ctrl> effect depends on the damage the Defender has taken from <ctrl>taunted</ctrl> enemies. For every <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of their max HPMax lost, the <ctrl>fear</ctrl> duration is extended by <w>+0.5</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: After targets lose <ctrl>fear</ctrl>, they are <ctrl>slowed</ctrl> by <w>50%</w> for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Empowered Vanguard
nodes.description: <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> bonus <arp> Armor</arp> and <mr> Resist</mr> for each enemy.
nodes.level_bonus_text: This ability's damage and threat generation is increased by 30%.

nodes.name: Fallen Fury
nodes.description: When the Defender's health drops below <w>40%</w>, they gain a <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> increase in AttackPower and <w>20%</w> Vamp for <w>10</w> seconds. Cooldown: <w>1</w> minute. The death of an ally instantly resets this cooldown.
nodes.level_bonus_text: The effect duration lasts 15 seconds and gives immunity to <ctrl>slow</ctrl> and <ctrl>root</ctrl> effects.

nodes.name: Iron Aegis
nodes.description: The Defender can equip heavy and medium shields (reducing MoveSpeed by <w>10%</w>) that grant increased Armor due to their size, replacing his shield-throwing ability with one that blocks all strikes for <w>{{Data.0.AV}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: While a heavy shield is equipped, Defender gains <w>20%</w> bonus to BlockMainAttackPercent.

nodes.name: Guardian's Sacrifice
nodes.description: The Defender can use an ability on a chosen ally to redirect <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of the damage the ally takes onto themselves. <cdri><cdr> Cooldown</cdr>: <w>3</w> minutes. Has shared <cdri><cdr> Cooldown</cdr> with <w>Banner of Protection</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Each hit target heals <w>40%</w> of incoming damage.

nodes.name: Banner of Protection
nodes.description:
Deploys a banner directly in front of the caster for <w>30</w> seconds, granting all allies a protective aura derived from his defensive bonuses that provide ({{Data.0.ACP2}})Armor and ({{Data.0.ACP2}})Resist. <cdri><cdr> Cooldown</cdr>: <w>3</w> minutes. Has shared <cdri><cdr> Cooldown</cdr> with <w>Guardian's Sacrifice</w>.
Press Shift+T.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Gives everyone who was within banner aura during its deployment a (30%)HPMax shield for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Mobile Barrier
nodes.description:
During the ability, the Defender can leap to his allies, shielding them with his protective shield.

<cdr>Cooldown</cdr>: <w>{{Data.0.AC1}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Allies take reduced damage for 10 seconds, after Defender leaps towards them.

nodes.name: Celestial Barrier
nodes.description:
The Defender raises his shield and receives a beam of light from the sky, which, upon striking the shield, forms an energy dome lasting <w>5</w> seconds. Under the dome, the damage taken by all allies is reduced by an amount equal to the Defender's defensive stats.
<w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> defensive attributes.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Allies under the dome reflect <w>40%</w> of incoming damage.

warmonger/legionary.description: Tanks who fight with spear and shield. They can stun and slow enemies with their mighty strikes and blows and make them vulnerable to their abilities.

nodes.skill_name: On the point of a spear
nodes.name: Crippling Bash
nodes.description: The ability <ctrl>slows</ctrl> down affected enemies by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> for <w>5</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Applies a debuff that increases the duration of <ctrl>crowd control</ctrl> on the target by <w>30%</w> for <w>5</w> seconds.

nodes.skill_name: On the point of a spear
nodes.name: Mana Rebound
nodes.description: If the interrupt was successful, the Legionary restores (<w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>)MPMax to themselves in an amount equal to the interrupt ability's cost.
nodes.level_bonus_text: When interrupt is succesful, reduce your <w>Shield Bash</w> ability <cdri> <cdr>cooldown</cdr> by <w>50%</w>.

nodes.skill_name: On the point of a spear
nodes.name: Precision Slam
nodes.description: If the ability hits only one opponent, they are <ctrl>stunned</ctrl> for <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Works on <w>2</w> targets.

nodes.skill_name: On the point of a spear
nodes.name: Mirror Shield
nodes.description: After using the ability, the Legionary gains a <shieldpowi> <shieldpow>Shield</shieldpow> for <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> seconds that reflects the damage from the next incoming ability.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Reflects <w>2</w> abilities.

nodes.skill_name: On the point of a spear
nodes.name: Earthquake
nodes.description: The ability can be reactivated within <w>2</w> seconds. The Legionary strikes the ground with their shield, creating a Shockwave in the chosen direction that deals <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [({{Data.0.ACP2}})AttackPower + (50%)Armor] <md>magic damage</md> and knocks up all affected targets.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>-1</w> second to <w>Spear Throw</w> <cdri> <cdr>Cooldown</cdr> for every hit target.

nodes.name: Momentum Transfer
nodes.description: The Legionary throws an ally with precise balance, transferring the momentum of the throw to the ally. The ally's MoveSpeed is increased by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> for <w>3</w> seconds upon landing.
nodes.level_bonus_text: MoveSpeedFinalKPositive buff also grants <w>immunity</w> to <ctrl>slowing</ctrl>.

nodes.name: Impact Core
nodes.description: Enemies caught in the center of the affected area receive additional <md>magic damage</md> equal to <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of the thrown target's Maximum HPMax.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <ctrl>Stuns</ctrl> enemies in the center of the circle for <w>2</w> seconds. If the target has a <w>mark</w>, <ctrl>stun</ctrl> lasts twice longer.

nodes.name: Dominance
nodes.description: The throwing radius is doubled if target’s maximum HPMax is less than <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of the Legionary's maximum HPMax.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Damage is increased by <w>2%</w> for every meter of the thrown distance.

nodes.name: Perfected Toss
nodes.description:
After landing, the enemy's <armat>Armor</armat> and Resist are reduced by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> for each accumulated effect of the special ability. The debuff lasts for <w>3</w> seconds.
After landing an ally, their <armi><armat>Armor</armat> and Resist are increased by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> for each accumulated effect of the special ability. The buff lasts for <w>3</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>Shift + W</w>: Instead of throwing, the Legionnaire can jump to the designated position.

nodes.name: Follow-Up Rush
nodes.description: The ability can be reactivated within <w>2</w> seconds: The Legionary makes a dash towards the thrown target.
nodes.level_bonus_text: After landing, deal damage equal to <w>5%</w> of your <hp>Maximum <hpi> health</hp> within <w>2</w>-meter landing radius.

nodes.name: Relentless Provocation
nodes.description: <ctrl>Taunts</ctrl> vulnerable targets for +<w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <ctrl>Taunted</ctrl> targets receive <w>15%</w> more damage.

nodes.name: Initial Impact
nodes.description: Increases the damage dealt to the first affected target by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <ctrl>Slows</ctrl> the first target by <w>40%</w> for <w>5</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Piercing Spear
nodes.description: The ability ignores <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of the first enemy's Armor.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <ctrl>Taunts</ctrl> the first target even when there' no <w>mark</w>. <ctrl>Taunt</ctrl> is twice longer with the mark.

nodes.name: Cold Steel
nodes.description: When the ability is on cooldown, Legionary's basic attacks deal additional <pd>physical damage</pd> (<w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> Armor).
nodes.level_bonus_text: Every hit reduces cooldown by <w>0.5</w> second for <w>Spear Throw</w>.

nodes.name: Spear Lunge
nodes.description: If the ability hits an enemy, it can be reactivated. The Legionary performs a spear lunge, dealing <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}}</pd> = [<w>70</w> - <w>250</w>(depending on hero level) + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})AttackPower)]<pd> physical damage</pd>. For each charge of the special ability, the lunge ignores <w>{{Data.0.ACP4}}</w> of the enemy's Armor.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Deals <w>50%</w> of target's Armor as <pd>damage</pd>.

nodes.name: Combat Renewal
nodes.description: If the ability charges expire, the Legionary restores <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of maximum HPMax per charge.
nodes.level_bonus_text: After all <w>10</w> stacks are lost, restore <w>2%</w> of your max HPBonus every seconds for <w>10</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Smell of Blood
nodes.description: The Legionary gains <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> charges for a <w>Kill</w> and <w>{{Data.0.AC1}}</w> charge for <w>Assisting</w> in a kill.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <w>Kills</w> and <w>Assists</w> increase damage by <w>10%</w> for <w>5</w> seconds. Stacks up to <w>3</w> times.

nodes.name: Stacking Mastery
nodes.description: Abilities on hit now also grant <w>{{Data.0.AV}}</w> stack for passive ability.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Stacks last twice longer.

nodes.name: Fortified Barrier
nodes.description:
When reaching the maximum number of charges, the Legionary gains a <shieldpowi> <shieldpow>Shield</shieldpow> with a strength of <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of maximum HPMax + (<w>50%</w> (Armor + Resist)) for <w>5</w> seconds.
<cdri> <cdr>Cooldown</cdr>: <w>30</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Gives <w>50%</w> <ctrl>Slow</ctrl> resist.

nodes.name: Throwing Expert
nodes.description:
<w>Active</w>: Enter a throwing stance using your current passive ability charges. While active, the Legionary gains <w>{{Data.0.AC5}}</w> meters of additional attack range. This effect lasts for <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> second(s) per active charge.
<cdri> <cdr>Cooldown</cdr>: <w>30</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Throw range is increased by <w>2</w> meters.

nodes.name: Resilient Vigor
nodes.description: Using the ability removes all negative effects from the Legionary, rendering them immune to all crowd control effects and increasing the bonus attack damage gained from Armor and Resist by up to <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>. The duration of the effect is increased by <w>0.5</w> seconds for each charge of the special ability.
nodes.level_bonus_text: When under the effect of <ctrl>hard control</ctrl>, the buff lasts longer by <w>3</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Sacrifice Protection
nodes.description: The Legionary takes less damage. Each charge of the special ability reduces incoming damage by <w>0.5%</w>. Additionaly Legionary can target an ally when using ultimate ablility and redirect <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> incoming damage to this ally to him self for the duration of the ultimate ability. Can retarget protection by pressing <w>R</w>. The duration of the effect is increased by <w>0.5</w> seconds for each charge of the special ability.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Defended ally also deflects <w>50%</w> of incoming damage.

warmonger/shaman.description: Melee fighters, coming from a kindred of orcs who can talk with animal spirits and command the elements.They wield different fist weapons and mark enemies with their basic attacks.

nodes.name: Balance Breaker
nodes.description: Shaman's Leap disrupts the target's balance and <ctrl>interrupts</ctrl> ability usage.
nodes.level_bonus_text: After successful <ctrl>interrupt</ctrl>, the target is <pcp>weakened</pcp>, increasing damage taken from all sources by <w>20%</w>.

nodes.name: Accelerated Assault
nodes.description: After the leap, the shaman harnesses the movement impulse, granting the next <w>4</w> auto-attacks <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> increased AttackSpeed. Cap on AttackSpeed is removed during these attacks.
nodes.level_bonus_text: AttackSpeed cap is removed during these attacks and for <w>3</w> seconds afterward.

nodes.name: Versatile Movement
nodes.description: The shaman is able to jump to allied targets.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Leaping to an ally increases both the Shaman’s and the ally’s MoveSpeedFinalKPositive by <w>20%</w> for <w>2</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Rending Knuckles
nodes.description: The shaman plunges his knuckles into an enemy target, leaving gaping wounds that deal periodic <pd>physical damage</pd> equal to <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}}</pd> = [({{Data.0.ACP3}})AttackPower] over <w>5</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If all <w>4</w> empowered attacks hit the same target, the Shaman causes an extra tear, applying an additional Bleed effect.

nodes.name: Swift Roll
nodes.description: The additional dash now has <w>2</w> charges and can be used twice in a row.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Gains <w>20%</w> movement speed and <w>50%</w> slow resistance for <w>2</w> seconds after rolling.

nodes.name: Extended Totem
nodes.description: Increases the totem's duration by <w>{{Data.0.AC3}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text:
<w>Totems gain additional effects</w>: 
<shieldpd>Fire Totem</shieldpd> increases its damage to the target by <w>5%</w> with each hit. 
<mreg>Water Totem</mreg> boosts its <heal>healing</heal> to the target by <w>0.5%</w> for each <heal>healing</heal> tick, stacking up to <w>10%</w>. 
<slr>Earth Totem</slr> increases target’s AttackPower by <w>0.2%</w> per second, stacking up to <w>10%</w> for <w>20</w> seconds. Can be stacked from multiple totems.

nodes.name: Expanded Influence
nodes.description: Increases the totem's effective radius by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Totem effects are <w>15%</w> stronger at the <w>outer edge</w> of its range, beyond <w>4</w> meters.

nodes.name: Close Harmony
nodes.description: Totem effects become stronger within the <w>inner circle</w> by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: The shaman's totems become sturdier and gain <w>+2</w> <hp>maximum <hpi> Health</hp>.

nodes.name: Elemental Efficiency
nodes.description: There is a <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> chance that the totem won't consume a stack.
nodes.level_bonus_text:
<w>Totems enter resonance upon each talent activation</w>: 
<shieldpd>Fire Totem</shieldpd> emits a fiery wave in a <w>6</w>-meter radius, dealing <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>20</w> + (75%)SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md> to enemies. 
<mreg>Water Totem</mreg> releases a <heal>healing</heal> wave, restoring <heal>{{Data.0.ADF2}}</heal> = [<w>40</w> + (80%)HLPower] to allies. 
<slr>Earth Totem</slr> grants all allies a shield equal to <w>10%</w> of their <hp>maximum <hpi> Health</hp>, absorbing <pd>physical damage</pd>. While shielded, incoming basic attack damage is reduced by <w>10%</w> for <w>5</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Totemic Empowerment
nodes.description:
<shieldpd>Fire Totem</shieldpd> - Attacks <w>2</w> targets simultaneously with magical damage increased by <w>{{Data.0.ACP4}}</w>
<mreg>Water Totem</mreg> - <w>Cleanses</w> <w>1</w> <ctrl>debuff</ctrl> from the shaman or an ally when placing a <mreg>Water Totem</mreg>. Amount of <w>cleansed</w> targets may vary depending on talent level and equals <w>{{Data.0.AC3}}</w>. 
<slr>Earth Totem</slr> - Reduces enemy MoveSpeed by <w>{{Data.0.ACP5}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: <shieldpd>Fire Totem</shieldpd>: hits trigger an <shieldpd>explosion</shieldpd> that deals <w>40%</w> of the original damage to enemies within <w>1.5 meters</w> of the target. \n<mreg>Water Totem</mreg>: on activation, If a debuff is removed, instantly <heal>heals</heal> the target for <w>10%</w> <hp>maximum</hp> HPBonus. \n<slr>Earth Totem</slr>: when placed, <ctrl>roots</ctrl> enemies in its area for <w>2</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Lightning Recoil
nodes.description: The first target hit by the lightning is <ctrl>knocked back</ctrl> by <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> meters.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Colliding with another enemy <ctrl>stuns</ctrl> both for <w>2</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Electrifying Aftershock
nodes.description: If the ability deals critical damage, it leaves electric charges on the target, inflicting periodic \n<md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> <md>magical damage</md> = [<w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})SpellPower] each second over <w>5</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Each tick reduces the target’s Resist by <w>5%</w>, stacking up to <w>5</w> times.

nodes.name: Dual Lightning Strikes
nodes.description: The ability has <w>2</w> charges now. Shaman gains <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> <w>MoveSpeed</w> per charge on <cdri><cdr>Cooldown</cdr>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Using both charges within <w>3</w> seconds doubles the MoveSpeed bonus for <w>5</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Chain Lightning
nodes.description: The Shaman delves deeper into the knowledge of the air element, making his lightning more destructive. <w>Lightning Strike</w> becomes a <w>chain ability</w>, hitting up to <w>4 targets</w>. Each subsequent target takes <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> less damage.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Lightning can bounce to the <w>same</w> targets multiple times, but each repeated hit on the <w>same</w> target deals <w>60%</w> reduced damage.

nodes.name: Molten Comet
nodes.description:
Harnessing the raw power of the storm, the Shaman transcends lightning itself. <w>Upon reaching 5 stacks of Elemental Mastery</w>, <w>Lightning Strike</w> is replaced with <w>Molten Comet</w> - a high-impact single-target spell that unleashes a blazing meteor from the Shaman’s own hands dealing 
<md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})SpellPower] <md>magical damage</md>.
On hit, applies a <w>Ashen Decay</w> DoT effect to the target which deals <md>{{Data.0.ADF2}}</md> <md>magic damage</md> each second over <w>7</w> seconds (total: [<w>50</w> + (200%)SpellPower]).
nodes.level_bonus_text: Each <w>Ashen Decay</w> stack on the target increases Molten Comet’s damage by +15%.

nodes.name: Prolonged Haste
nodes.description: The AttackSpeed buff duration is extended by <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: When <w>5 Elemental Mastery</w> stacks are consumed, the Shaman gains AttackSpeed <w>%</w> equal to the <w>remaining time</w> on the effect.

nodes.name: Enhanced Charge Accumulation
nodes.description:
<w>Rip Apart</w> now applies charge of <w>Elemental Mastery</w>. 
<w>Lightning Strike</w> now applies <w>additional</w> charge of <w>Elemental Mastery</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Using <w>Rip Apart</w> or <w>Lightning Strike</w> at 5 <w>Elemental Mastery</w> stacks reduces their <cdri><cdr>Cooldown</cdr> by <w>30%</w> and decreases totem <mpi><mp>Mana</mp> cost by <w>50%</w>.

nodes.name: Distance Boost
nodes.description: Each <w>Elemental Mastery</w> increases the range of <w>Rip Apart</w> and <w>Lightning Strike</w> by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Using abilities from <w>8+</w> meters empowers the Shaman, granting a buff for <w>8</w> seconds that increases AttackPower / SpellPower / HLPower by <w>5%</w> (adaptively). Stacks up to <w>3</w> times.

nodes.name: Charge Overflow
nodes.description:
There is a <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> chance to gain <w>{{Data.0.AC5}}</w> stacks at once instead of one.

You can press <w>Shift+T</w> to begin a <w>{{Data.0.AC1}}</w>-second cast that grants <w>5</w> stacks of the <w>Elemental Mastery</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text:
Pressing <w>Shift + T</w> grants a <w>7</w>-second buff based on the current element. 
<shieldpd>Fire Element</shieldpd>: gain <w>+10%</w> AttackPower / SpellPower (adaptive). 
<mreg>Water Element</mreg>: gain <w>+10%</w> HLPower. 
<slr>Earth Element</slr>: the Shaman emits an aura that deals <w>1.5%</w> of <hp>maximum <hpi> Health</hp> as damage per second to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Elemental Synergy
nodes.description:
Shaman enters a state of synergy with the elements and gains the following bonuses depending on the chosen element while having <w>5</w> stacks of <w>Elemental Mastery</w> and <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> seconds after they expire: 

<shieldpd>Fire Element</shieldpd> - Knuckles ignite, causing the Shaman to deal additional ({{Data.0.ACP4}})SpellPower <md>magic damage</md> with auto-attacks.
<mreg>Water Element</mreg> - Restores <mpi> <mp>Mana</mp> with auto-attacks (<w>{{Data.0.ACP5}}</w> of damage dealt).
<slr>Earth Element</slr> - Skin hardens, reducing enemy auto-attack damage by <w>{{Data.0.AV3}}%</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Under <shieldpd>Fire Element</shieldpd>: auto-attacks additionaly reduce the target’s Resist by <w>3</w> per hit for <w>5</w> seconds, stacking up to <w>10 times</w>. \n<mreg>Water Element</mreg>: auto-attack grants a stack, boosting <mp>mana regeneration</w> rate by <w>10%</w> for <w>5</w> seconds, stacking up to <w>5</w> times. \n<slr>Earth Element</slr>: shield allows to reflect <w>mitigated</w> damage back to attackers.

nodes.name: Spirits Fusion
nodes.description:
<w>Spirit Fusion</w> lets your Shaman temporarily attune to an element, granting powerful, specialized buffs.

<shieldpd>Fire Element</shieldpd>: Your <w>Lightning Strike</w> has minus <w>3</w> seconds <cdri><cdr>Cooldown</cdr>. Each cast costs <w>10%</w> more <mpi> <mp>mana</mp>.

<mreg>Water Element</mreg>: Your <w>Lightning Strike</w> is replaced with <w>Chain Heal</w> <heal>healing</heal> ability. It can jump up to <w>4</w> targets, reducing healing effectiveness by <w>20%</w> per jump. It can hit the same target non-consecutively and has a <w>4</w> seconds <cdri><cdr>Cooldown</cdr>. Each cast costs <w>5%</w> more <mpi> <mp>mana</mp>.

<slr>Earth Element</slr>: Your next auto-attack after using <w>Rip Apart</w> ability deals <w>50%</w> more damage, becomes <w>AOE</w> (<w>4</w>-meter radius) and creates an <w>Earthquake</w> zone for <w>5</w> seconds. The zone deals <pd>{{Data.0.AC4}}</pd> = [<w>3%</w> Shaman <hp>maximum</hp> HPBonus + <w>50</w> + (70%)AttackPower] <pd>physical damage</pd> per second.

Press <w>Shift+R</w> to activate. Has <w>15</w> seconds <cdri><cdr>Cooldown</cdr>. Consumes <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> + <w>{{Data.0.ACP5}}</w> SpellPower / AttackPower / HLPower MPMax per second, depending on the selected element.
nodes.level_bonus_text:
<w>Stengthens the Shaman’s abilities based on their attuned element</w>. 
<shieldpd>Fire Element</shieldpd>: each stack that increases MPMax cost also boosts <w>Lightning Strike</w> damage by <w>2%</w>. 
<mreg>Water Element</mreg>: <w>Chain Heal</w> applies a HoT effect that restores <heal>{{Data.0.AC3}}</heal> = [(10%)HLPower] each second over <w>10</w> seconds. 
<slr>Earth Element</slr>: each tick of <w>Earthquake</w> <ctrl>slows</ctrl> enemies by <w>10%</w> for <w>2</w> seconds, effect stacks up to <w>5</w> times.

nodes.name: Empowered Direwolf Form
nodes.description:
The summoned wolf receives <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> stats + (<w>1%</w> adaptive for every <w>25</w> SpellPower / HLPower / AttackPower). It increases in size and generates increased <pcp>threat</pcp> with its attacks.
When recast on a friendly target, the wolf establishes a <w>spiritual bond</w> with them.

<w>Paw Strike</w> becomes more deadly.
<shieldpd>Fire Element</shieldpd>: The wolf additionally applies a damage-over-time effect (DoT) that deals <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>40</w> + (24%)SpellPower)] <md>magical damage</md> to all targets hit by the paw strike.
<mreg>Water Element</mreg>: After the paw strike, a <heal>healing</heal> aura appears around the wolf, lasting for <w>5</w> seconds and healing <heal>{{Data.0.AC1}}</heal> = [<w>40</w> + (24%)HLPower] to all allies within an <w>5</w> meter radius.
<slr>Earth Element</slr>: The wolf <ctrl>taunts</ctrl> all affected enemies.

<cdri><cdr>Cooldown</cdr> is <w>15</w> seconds.
Consumes <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> + <w>{{Data.0.ACP5}}</w> SpellPower / AttackPower / HLPower MPMax per second, depending on the selected element.
Press <w>Shift+R</w> to use.
nodes.level_bonus_text:
Wolf <w>Paw Strikes</w> become more powerful. 
<shieldpd>Fire Element</shieldpd>: the initial DoT from the Paw Strike becomes a <shieldpd>Living Bomb</shieldpd>, dealing <md>{{Data.0.ADF2}}</md> = [<w>20</w> + (12%)SpellPower] each second over <w>5</w> seconds. When the effect ends, it <shieldpd>explodes</shieldpd>, dealing the same damage to all enemies within <w>2</w> meters and applies a secondary DoT, which deals <md>{{Data.0.ADF3}}</md> = [<w>40</w> + (24%)SpellPower]. 
Allies or the Shaman can <shieldpd>detonate</shieldpd> the <shieldpd>Living Bomb</shieldpd> early with a basic attack, causing it to explode instantly and deal <w>double damage</w>. 
<mreg>Water Element</mreg>: each tick of <heal>healing</heal> grants a <w>1%</w> MoveSpeedFinalKPositive buff for <w>2</w> seconds, stacking up to <w>20</w> times. 
<slr>Earth Element</slr>: the <ctrl>taunt</ctrl> from Paw Strike does not trigger diminishing returns.

bomber/blast_medic.description: Ranged support heroes who use grenade launchers and can wield various explosives. They heal allies, buff them, or use crowd control against enemies and create illusions to trick them.

nodes.name: Rebound Precision
nodes.description: Increases the projectile's bounces by <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Decreases the ability <cdri> <cdr>Cooldown</cdr> by <w>0.4</w> seconds for each projectile bounce.

nodes.name: Walking Arsenal
nodes.description: Blast Medic can move while using this skill, but MoveSpeedFinalKPositive is reduced by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: MoveSpeedFinalKPositive is increased by <w>30%</w> during the ability cast.

nodes.name: Extended Ricochet
nodes.description: Increases the ricochet range to the next target by <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> meter.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Can bounce twice against the same target. When an attack bounces twice against the same target, the damage is lowered by <w>50%</w>.

nodes.name: Fearsome Mines
nodes.description: Each ricochet attaches a mine to the enemy for <w>5</w> seconds, which activates <w>2</w> seconds after. The mine will detonate on the enemy if the Blast Medic shoots it with an auto-attack, dealing <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md>. The detonation will <ctrl>fear</ctrl> the target for <w>2</w> seconds. The mine can be dispelled.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Mine detonates automatically at the end of its effect.

nodes.name: Shielding Echo
nodes.description: Each hit attaches a mine to an ally for <w>5</w> seconds. <hri><heal>Healing</heal> or <shieldpowi><shieldpow>Shielding</shieldpow> the target triggers the mine, causing it to generate a <shieldpowi><shieldpow>shield</shieldpow> that absorbs <w>{{Data.0.ADF}}</w> = [<w>50</w> + <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> HLPower] damage for <w>3</w> seconds. The mine can be dispelled.
nodes.level_bonus_text: For each auto-attack while the shield is still active the allies restores HPBonus in amount equal to <w>20%</w> of HLPower.

nodes.name: Speed Guard
nodes.description: While the <shield>shield</shield> from this ability is active, the target receives a <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> reduction in <ctrl>slowing</ctrl> effects.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Grants immunity to <ctrl>Root</ctrl> effects while under duration of the <w>Shield</w>.

nodes.name: Shattering Blast
nodes.description: Reduces Armor and Resist of enemies hit by the explosion by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> for <w>5</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Increases the damage that the target receives by <w>15%</w> for a duration of effect.

nodes.name: Prolonged Blindness
nodes.description: <ctrl>Blind</ctrl> effect +<w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> second.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Decreases the target's AttackSpeed by <w>40%</w> for <w>3</w> seconds at the end of the <ctrl>Blind</ctrl> effect.

nodes.name: Enhanced Blast Zone
nodes.description: The blast radius is increased by <w>1.5</w> meters, and damage and shield effects are enhanced by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> at the center of the area.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Increases the radius of inner circle by <w>1</w> meter.

nodes.name: Smoke Screen Tactics
nodes.description: After exploding, the bomb turns into a smoke bomb, dispersing a thick smoke cloud in the blast area for <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> seconds. The Blast Medic is invisible to enemies while in this cloud. If an enemy enters the smoke cloud, they will see the Blast Medic and can attack him.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Enemies' vision in the smoke cloud is decreased to a <w>2</w>-meter radius, and they are <ctrl>slowed</ctrl> by <w>30%</w>

nodes.name: Regenerative Impact
nodes.description: When the clone hits enemies, the Blast Medic restores <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> + (<w>1%</w> for every <w>200</w> HLPower) of his maximum HPBonus.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Blast Medic receives a <w>10%</w> <shieldpowi> <shieldpow>Shield</shieldpow> of his maximum HPBonus for each enemy that was hit (max <w>35%</w>).

nodes.name: Explosive Swap
nodes.description: At the moment of teleportation, a <w>3</w>-meter radius blast occurs at the clone's location, dealing <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>50</w> + <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> SpellPower] <md>magical damage</md>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Blast radius increases by <w>2</w> meters. Enemies are <ctrl>pushed</ctrl> back by the explosion.

nodes.name: Stunning Transposition
nodes.description: When the Blast Medic teleports through an enemy, the enemy is <ctrl>stunned</ctrl> for <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: An explosion that deals <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>130%</w> SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md> to nearby enemies will occur at the end of the <ctrl>Stun</ctrl> effect.

nodes.name: Controlled Decoy
nodes.description:
The Blast Medic can control their clone.
You can automatically teleport by using <w>Shift +E</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Clone emanates the aura that deals <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>20%</w> SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md> per second to all enemies around him.

nodes.name: Twin Swap Sequence
nodes.description: You can reuse the ability within <w>2</w> seconds to swap places with the clone.
nodes.level_bonus_text: You can reuse the ability to swap with the clone up to <w>3</w> times.

nodes.name: Speed Surge Protocol
nodes.description: Activating one of the modes increases the Blast Medic's MoveSpeedFinalKPositive by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> for <w>3</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: While under the effect also grants <w>60%</w> <ctrl>Slow</ctrl> resistance.

nodes.name: Threat Reduction Burst
nodes.description: Activating a mode causes an energy burst and reduces the Blast Medic's <pcc>aggro</pcc> by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Grants <w>invisibility</w> for <w>3</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Malfunction: All Modes Engaged
nodes.description: When selecting a mode, there is a <w>15%</w> chance of a malfunction. The glitch causes all <w>3</w> modes to be activated simultaneously.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Electric arc <ctrl>Stuns</ctrl> all enemies caught in it for <w>1.5</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Upgraded Firmware
nodes.description: Increases healing and damage effects by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> and grants <w>{{Data.0.AC2}}</w> additional auto-attack.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Depending on the effect grants <w>+15%</w> to HLPower / AttackPower / SpellPower.

nodes.name: Swift Activation Reset
nodes.description: The ability can be used again within <w>2</w> seconds. The mode that was last selected will be chosen automatically. The cost of reusing the ability is <w>{{Data.0.ACP4}}</w> of the current MPMax pool, but not less than <w>20</w> MPMax.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Allows for the third activation of the ability.

nodes.name: Omni-Assist Module
nodes.description:
- Removes all crowd control effects from an ally.
- While the Blast Medic is under the shield, he regenerates health at <w>2%</w> of maximum HPMax per second.
- While the enemy is under the drone's effect, they take <w>15%</w> more incoming damage.
nodes.level_bonus_text:
Grants <ctrl>Stun</ctrl> immunity to an ally.
Blast Medic <hr>heals</hr> for <w>2%</w> more for each <w>1%</w> of missing <hp>health</hp>.
Basic attacks apply a stacking debuff to an enemy that decreases their Resist by <w>5</w> for <w>5</w> seconds, stacks up to <w>50</w> times.

nodes.name: Fear Cascade Detonation Device
nodes.description: The Blast Medic throws a drone at the target, dealing <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>50</w> + <w>{{Data.0.ACP3}}</w> AttackPower + <w>{{Data.0.ACP3}}</w> <spi> <sp>SpellPower</sp>] <md>magic damage</md> and causing <ctrl>fear</ctrl> and <ctrl>slowing</ctrl> the target by <w>70%</w> for <w>2</w> seconds. After the debuff expires, the drone detonates (radius <w>2</w>m), dealing <md>{{Data.0.ADF2}}</md> = [<w>{{Data.0.ACP3}}</w> AttackPower + <w>{{Data.0.ACP3}}</w> SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md> and causing <ctrl>fear</ctrl> for <w>2</w> seconds to all enemies within the explosion radius.
nodes.level_bonus_text: The chain explosion spreads to secondary targets and triggers again.

bomber/infiltrator.description: Melee assassins who deal massive damage in a short amount of time. They use double daggers and mines. They can become invisible to foes, and easily finish off enemies with low health.

nodes.name: Shadow Grace
nodes.description:
<w>Camouflage</w>: MoveSpeedFinalKPositive in Camouflage is increased by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
<w>Assassin's Precision</w>: MoveSpeedFinalKPositive during Assassin's Precision stance is increased by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text:
<w>Camouflage</w>: After Camouflage wears off, <w>Shadow Grace</w> effect lasts <w>5</w> more seconds unless you take damage.
<w>Assassin's Precision</w>: Activating ability removes <ctrl>root</ctrl>.

nodes.name: Flurry
nodes.description:
<w>Camouflage</w>: When leaving invisibility, AttackSpeed is increased by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> for <w>4</w> seconds.
<w>Assassin's Precision</w>: When entering Assassin's Precision, during stance, AttackSpeed is increased by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text:
<w>Camouflage</w>: Removes the cap for AttackSpeed.
<w>Assassin's Precision</w>: Removes the cap for AttackSpeed.

nodes.name: Vanish Device
nodes.description:
<w>Camouflage</w>: The new generation camouflage device allows for instant invisibility. 
<w>Assassin's Precision</w>: Upon entering Assassin's Precision stance, infiltrator vanishes for <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> second and loses <w>90%</w> aggro.
nodes.level_bonus_text:
<w>Camouflage</w>: Allows making 3 nearby ally targets <w>invisible</w>.
<w>Assassin's Precision</w>: Removing <ctrl>soft control</ctrl> and cleansing all DoT effects (except Bleed).

nodes.name: Advanced Cloaking Algorithm
nodes.description: Upgraded camouflage enables you to sneak closer to enemies.
nodes.level_bonus_text:
Reactivate <w>Camouflage</w> by pressing the <w>Q</w> key again to extend its duration.
If you have <w>Ambush</w> activated, press <w>Shift+Q</w> to reactivate.

nodes.name: Ambush
nodes.description:
<w>Camouflage</w>: The Infiltrator has learned the Ambush skill. While in camouflage, the Infiltrator can teleport behind an enemy's back and deliver <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}}</pd> = [<w>{{Data.0.ADF3}}</w> + ({{Data.0.ACP2}})AttackPower] <pd>physical damage</pd> to an enemy. This attack always deals <pcci><pcc> Critical damage</pcc>.
<w>Assassin's Precision</w>: Each attack in Assassin's Precision stance is empowered by another <pd>({{Data.0.ACP4}}) damage</pd>.
nodes.level_bonus_text:
<w>Camouflage</w>: Target gets a Bleed effect for <w>10</w> seconds taking <pd>{{Data.0.AV3}}</pd> = <w>20</w> + (30%)AttackPower <pd>physical damage</pd> per second.
<w>Assassin's Precision</w>: Every attack extends Bleed effects by <w>3</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Stunning Grenade
nodes.description: If the mine lands on an enemy, they will be <ctrl>stunned</ctrl> for <w>{{Data.0.AC4}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Target receives <w>50%</w> less <hpow>Heal</hpow>.

nodes.name: Dazzler
nodes.description: The Infiltrator uses an advanced version of the mine with a flash effect. Enemies caught in the blast radius are also <ctrl>blinded</ctrl> for <w>{{Data.0.AC4}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If a mine hits a <ctrl>blinded</ctrl> target, they become <arp>disarmed</arp> for <w>3</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Minefield Deployment
nodes.description: Up to <w>{{Data.0.AV3}}</w> mines can be active simultaneously.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Adds <w>1</w> stack.

nodes.name: Stealthy Sabotage
nodes.description: The Infiltrator can throw a mine from stealth without interrupting it.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Explosion radius is increased up to <w>4</w> meters. The installation time is <w>twice</w> shorter.

nodes.name: Chain Reaction
nodes.description: Press Shift+W to cause mines within a <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w>-meter radius to rise into the air (<w>0.3</w> seconds) and explode, doubling their blast radius. When hit by more than one mine, only <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of the damage from each additional mine is counted.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Mines that hit target in the air stick to them, and can be detonated within next <w>10</w> seconds by pressing <w>Shift+W</w>.

nodes.name: Blitz
nodes.description: MoveSpeedFinalKPositive increases by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> towards the rooted target. Activates from <w>2</w> meters and further.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If the target were already under the <ctrl>hard-control</ctrl> effect, <ctrl>root's</ctrl> duration is doubled.

nodes.name: Defense Breakthrough
nodes.description: While the target is <ctrl>rooted</ctrl>, its defense stats are reduced by <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Target also loses <w>40%</w> of the <hpow>Incoming Heal</hpow> and their AttackSpeed.

nodes.name: Extended Payload
nodes.description: The Infiltrator grenade cluster now has twice as many grenades. (Blast radius is <w>doubled</w>).
nodes.level_bonus_text: Ability gets a second charge.

nodes.name: Overcharge Protocol
nodes.description: Carpet Bombing main explosion hit reduces <w>Mine Throw</w> cooldown by <w>{{Data.0.ADF}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Static Field ticks reduce <w>W</w> cooldown by <w>0.4</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Interdiction Protocol
nodes.description: If a <hpowi> <hpow>Healing</hpow> or <shieldpowi> <shieldpow>Shield</shieldpow> spell is applied to the <ctrl>rooted</ctrl> target, the caster will be also <ctrl>rooted</ctrl> for <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> seconds, <ctrl>silenced</ctrl> for <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Target receives <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>20</w> + <w>70%</w> SpellPower + <w>50%</w> AttackPower] <md>magic damage</md>.

nodes.name: Toxic Blades
nodes.description: The Infiltrator poisons the daggers before throwing, causing enemies to take additional <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>20</w> + <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md> over <w>7</w> seconds. This effect can stack.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If both daggers hit the target, it gets poisoned reducing its MoveSpeed by <w>60%</w>.

nodes.name: Lethal Precision
nodes.description: If the dagger hits from behind, the damage will always be <pcci> <pcc>Critical<pcc>.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If both daggers hit the back of the target, target receives additional <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}}</pd> = (<w>40</w> base damage + <w>80%</w> AttackPower) <pd>physical damage</pd>. This damage is always <pcci> <pcc>Critical</pcc>.

nodes.name: Fleet Footwork
nodes.description: For each dagger that hits the target, the Infiltrator gains a <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> MoveSpeed increase for <w>5</w> seconds.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If both daggers hit the target, the Infiltrator removes all negative effects from themselves (excluding Bleed).

nodes.name: Hemorrhage
nodes.description: If both daggers hit one target, the Infiltrator starts to drain life from the target through his daggers, draining <w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> of the target's <hp>Maximum <hpi> Health</hp> each second. This effect works with reduced efficiency against monsters and bosses.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If both daggers hit the target, infiltrator drains <w>10%</w> of <hp>Current <hpi> Health</hp> right away.

nodes.name: Elimination
nodes.description: Recast <w>T</w>: With shadow chains, the Infiltrator pulls his daggers back from the victim, dealing <md>{{Data.0.ADF}}</md> = [<w>{{Data.0.ACP2}}</w> SpellPower] <md>magic damage</md> for each dagger and causing a Bleed effect that deals <pd>{{Data.0.ADF2}}</pd> = [<w>{{Data.0.ACP4}}</w> AttackPower] <pd>physical damage</pd> per second for <w>7</w> seconds. Additionally, it removes <arp>disarm</arp> effect from the Infiltrator.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Target gets <ctrl>fear</ctrl> for <w>2</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Shadow Step
nodes.description: The Infiltrator shadow steps behind the enemy and delivers a dual dagger strike that deals <pd>{{Data.0.ADF}}</pd> = [<w>120%</w> AttackPower] <pd>physical damage</pd>. The skill has <w>3</w> charges. If the target's HPMax is at <w>20%</w> or below, the Infiltrator deals <w>20%</w> more damage.
nodes.level_bonus_text: If the ability is used on the enemy, next ability deals <w>20%</w> more damage. Stacks up to 3 times. Stack duration: <w>20</w> seconds.

nodes.name: Fade Away
nodes.description: After using the ultimate ability and hitting an enemy with it, if the skill hasn't recharged, the Infiltrator can enter stealth for <w>{{Data.0.AV2}}</w> seconds within the next <w>2</w> seconds. This removes all aggro.
nodes.level_bonus_text: Removes all agro. Taking damage does not remove stealth.

stats.name: Attack Power
stats.description: Increases physical damage dealt by autoattacks and physical abilities.

stats.name: Weapon Damage
stats.description: Base damage value of your weapon, used to calculate autoattack damage.

stats.name: Spell Power
stats.description: Increases magical damage dealt by spells and abilities.

stats.name: Health
stats.description: Your maximum Health pool; you are defeated when it reaches zero.

stats.name: Armor
stats.description: Reduces incoming physical damage.

stats.name: Magic Resistance
stats.description: Reduces incoming magical damage.

stats.name: Mana
stats.description: Your maximum Mana pool, consumed by casting abilities.

stats.name: Attack Speed
stats.description: Increases how fast you perform autoattacks.

stats.name: Physical Crit Chance
stats.description: Chance for physical attacks to land a critical hit.

stats.name: Physical Crit Power
stats.description: Extra damage dealt when a physical attack critically hits.

stats.name: Magical Crit Chance
stats.description: Chance for spells and abilities to land a critical hit.

stats.name: Magical Crit Power
stats.description: Extra damage dealt when a magical ability critically hits.

stats.name: Physical Penetration
stats.description: Ignores a percentage of the target's Armor.

stats.name: Magical Penetration
stats.description: Ignores a percentage of the target's Magic Resistance.

stats.name: Cooldown Reduction
stats.description: Reduces the remaining cooldown time of your abilities.

stats.name: Slow Resistance
stats.description: Reduces the duration and effect of movement-slowing effects applied to you.

stats.name: Tenacity
stats.description: Reduces the duration and effect of crowd-control effects (stuns, roots, and similar) applied to you.

stats.name: Physical Damage Decrease
stats.description: Reduces incoming physical damage by a percentage.

stats.name: Magical Damage Decrease
stats.description: Reduces incoming magical damage by a percentage.

stats.name: Movement Speed
stats.description: Increases how fast your character moves.

stats.name: Lifesteal
stats.description: Restores Health based on the damage dealt by your autoattacks.

stats.name: Ability Steal
stats.description: Restores Health based on the damage dealt by your abilities/spells.

stats.name: Health Regen
stats.description: Restores Health every second.

stats.name: Mana Regen
stats.description: Restores Mana every second.

stats.name: Heal & Shield Power
stats.description: Increases the amount of healing and shielding you provide to yourself and allies.

stats.name: Aggro
stats.description: Relative threat generation -- how strongly monsters prioritize attacking you. Modified by talents (Tank +50%, Assassin -20%) and some chips; a multiplier, not a combat rating.

stats.name: Bleed Damage
stats.description: Increases the damage dealt by Bleed effects.

stats.name: Bleed Chance
stats.description: Chance to inflict Bleed, a physical damage-over-time debuff.

stats.name: Corruption Chance
stats.description: Chance to inflict Corruption, a special magical debuff.

stats.name: Haste
stats.description: Reduces cast times and increases spell speed (the magical-side counterpart to Attack Speed).

stats.name: Cost Reduction
stats.description: Reduces the Mana/resource cost of abilities. Distinct from Cooldown Reduction (which reduces cast timers, not cost).

stats.name: Outgoing Damage Increase
stats.description: Increases all outgoing damage (a global damage-amplification stat, not tied to a specific damage type).

stats.name: Flat Physical Penetration
stats.description: Ignores a flat amount of the target's Armor (before the percentage Physical Penetration is applied).

stats.name: Flat Magical Penetration
stats.description: Ignores a flat amount of the target's Magic Resistance (before the percentage Magical Penetration is applied).

stats.name: Shield Block Chance
stats.description: Chance to block an incoming attack with a shield.

stats.name: Shield Block Power
stats.description: Amount of damage blocked by a shield when a block occurs.

stats.name: Magic Damage Reduction
stats.description: Reduces incoming magic damage by a FLAT amount (distinct from the percentage-based 'Magical Damage Decrease').

stats.name: Main Attack Damage Reduction
stats.description: Reduces incoming main-attack (autoattack) damage by a flat amount.

stats.name: Vision Range
stats.description: Increases your vision range.

stats.name: Heal and Shield Power Increase
stats.description: Increases Heal and Shield Power by a percentage -- listed by the source as a separate line from the flat/base 'Heal and Shield Power' main stat.

hero_base_stats._shared_template: All 6 heroes currently share a single base-stat template; per-class differentiation comes from each mastery's ability kit and itemization, not base attributes. Values are raw engine fields, not confirmed on-screen character-sheet totals -- treat as indicative only.

artifact_secondary_slots.by_tier_source: live probe of the reference builder (fresh-page-per-rarity reads, verified on 6 items across T1/T2/T3 with 1-3 fixed base stats each; slot count is a pure function of tier x rarity)
artifact_secondary_slots.by_tier_note: Upgraded/Overclocked add +1/+2 on top per the official synthesis notes (upgraded_bonus/overclocked_bonus); how the cap interacts with the T1/T2 epic count of 5 is UNCERTAIN (5+2 would exceed the old documented max of 5) -- cap uncertainty flagged, engine should clamp conservatively until verified in-game.
artifact_secondary_slots.base_deprecated_note: 'base' is the pre-V5 flat approximation kept ONLY for backward compatibility (it happens to equal the verified T3 curve); by_tier supersedes it -- consumers should read by_tier[tier][rarity].

notes: socket base table approximate — verify in game
Confirmed 4 rarities (Common/Uncommon/Rare/Epic) and 3 upgrade states (normal / upgraded / overclocked) via corepunk.help/guides/item-tiers-quality and corepunk.help/guides/item-modifications.

Confirmed qualitatively that higher item rarity/quality grants weapons additional chip slots and artifacts additional secondary stat slots, but no source found gives the exact per-rarity base counts (0/1/2/3) — the base table above remains an unverified approximation, not contradicted by research.

't3_grants_perks_instead' refers to the item's LEVEL TIER (T1 = equippable at level 1, T2 = level 10, T3 = level 20, per corepunk.help/guides/item-tiers-quality), not to rarity. corepunk.help/guides/item-modifications states that upgrading or overclocking a Tier 1 or Tier 2 item grants +1 / +2 extra chip slots (weapons) or secondary stats (artifacts) respectively, while upgrading/overclocking a Tier 3 item instead grants a talent/mastery tree perk — this matches the flag's intent but the tier axis is level-gated tier, separate from the rarity-keyed base table.
Confirmed artifact_main_stats list (Health, Attack Power, Spell Power, Magic Resistance, Heal & Shield Power, Mana, Armor) via corepunkers.com/stats-resources-mastering-corepunk-artifact-crafting.

Synthesis Machine fuse ratios (corepunk.help/guides/synthesis-machine): 5x Common -> 1 Uncommon, 5x Uncommon -> 1 Rare, 5x Rare -> 1 Epic (base fusion), with bonus chances to skip a tier (5x Common -> Rare 5%, 5x Common -> Epic 2%, 5x Uncommon -> Epic 2%). Separately, fusing 5x Normal-state Epic items yields an Upgraded Epic item, and fusing 5x Upgraded Epic items yields an Overclocked Epic item — an alternate path to the upgraded/overclocked states besides using upgrade kits. Fuse mechanics apply to Weapons, Artifacts, Chips and Runes.

corepunk.help/guides/item-tiers-quality also lists a 'craft probability' of obtaining higher quality during crafting/synthesis: Uncommon 15%, Rare 6%, Epic 2%. This wasn't fully reconciled against the Synthesis Machine bonus percentages above (they may describe different systems) and is included here only as an additional sourced data point.

corepunk.help/guides/item-modifications also documents Corrupted (artifact-only) modifications, unlocked using boss-head trophies from Prison Island bosses, granting unique proc effects (mana shield, lifesteal, vulnerability application, mana restoration) with cited proc chances ranging roughly 0.5%-5%. Not modeled in this schema, noted for future reference.

corruption.note: artifact-only endgame modifier (boss trophies); numbers indicative

boss_head_procs.effect_text: (0.5%-2.5%) Chance on ability use: Grants a shield equal to 20% of maximum mana for 10 seconds.
(1%-5%) Reduces damage taken from incoming auto attacks.
(0.5%-2.5%) Chance on-hit ability: Character steals 3% of the target's max HP.
(0.5%-2.5%) Chance on ability hit: Grants a 10-second buff that restores 2% of magic damage as mana.
(0.5%-2.5%) Chance on-hit ability: Target takes 5% more damage for 15 seconds.
(0.5%-2.5%) Chance on-hit ability: Burns mana equal to 5% of the damage dealt.
(0.5%-2.5%) Chance on ability use: Restores 50% of the mana spent on the ability.

star_model.interpretation: star = roll quality position within the stat band for the item's current rarity (bands from item stat_bands, else the generic combat.stat_rolls fallback)
star_model.status: bands are CLIENT-EXACT (decoded from the game client's roll tables; validated against 111/112 community bands and live server roll captures) -- the 1..5 star quintile derivation over the band remains the only assumption (in-game thresholds unconfirmed)
star_model.stat_point_weights_note: per-stat basket point values decoded from the client's artifact main-stat basket catalog (tier = main-stat point count); numeric roll ranges themselves are server-side
star_model.derivation: stars = 1 + floor(4 * (value - min) / max(1, max - min)), clamped 1..5; max value = 5 stars, min = 1 star
star_model.roll_model: rolls are uniform within the band, quantised to each stat's rounding_step (client-exact); the reference builder UI defaults new items to the band MAX

secondary_stat_pool.note: secondary-stat pick pool per the reference builder's stat picker (names resolved to stat ids); band values for secondaries are per-item where published, else the generic stat_rolls fallback
secondary_stat_pool.meta_source: reference builder's own secondary-stat picker (probed live)

assumptions: combat.base values come from the single shared shared engine hero template (see the internal extraction caution notes): nearly every base-suffixed ('*b') code is 0.0 in this client build, reading as a still-blank WIP template rather than confirmed Level-1 character-sheet totals. Real, plausible anchors found: physical/magical crit multiplier base = 2.0 (200% damage on crit, codes Pcpb/Mcpb -- Crit Power rating is the bonus added on top of this base; v2: combat.base deliberately ZEROES these two entries -- see their note fields -- so combat.crit_base_power is the sole carrier of the 2.0 and it can never be double-counted), movement speed base = 3.7 (code Msb, units unconfirmed), Slow Resistance hard cap = 0.7 (70%, code MXsr), current Health/Mana = 60/40 (codes Hp/Mp -- NOT base-suffixed, same low-confidence caveat as the source file).

crit_base_power = 2.0 (200% damage on a critical hit; Crit Power rating adds on top) is SOURCED, not assumed: client anchor Pcpb/Mcpb = 2.0 in the game client's shared hero template, cross-validated by https://corepunk.help/guides/stats (200% effective Crit Power at the DR threshold). A pre-wipe patch note (https://corepunk.com/en-us/news/7-month-milestone-current-status-next-steps-308, 2025-06-30) claims a 200%->150% change; the current client data still says 2.0, so 2.0 is used -- conflict flagged in dr_model.sourced_threshold_points. The engine consumes this via its data.combat.crit_base_power hook (falls back to an assumed 1.5 only when the field is absent).

physical_penetration/magical_penetration: the client has TWO parallel code families sharing the same human-readable name -- Pap*/Prp* ('Percentage * Penetration', used here, matches the rating+DR-threshold system) and Fap*/Frp* ('Flat * Penetration', a separate flat-point mechanic not modeled in this schema).

artifact_actives is empty from client data: exhaustively checked, no equippable artifact or socketable Active Rune in this client build carries a populated abilities/cooldown_group/params_raw chain (full negative-result trail retained in internal notes). Corepunk artifacts are passive stat-sticks (main stat + secondary rolls only) in this build. WEB RESEARCH CORROBORATES this: https://massivelyop.com/2026/01/02/corepunk-swaps-out-its-rune-system-and-makes-sweeping-changes-to-crafting/ and https://corepunk.help/guides/item-modifications confirm 'slotting an Active Rune into an artifact disables that artifact's passive bonus' -- i.e. the ARTIFACT supplies a passive stat, the socketed RUNE supplies the active button, exactly matching the client-data structure found. System-level facts found (no per-rune numbers): 30 total runes post-overhaul (6 passive + 24 active), 3 active runes per talent branch, most consume an item on use rather than costing mana, and bonuses from identical artifacts/runes don't stack -- source: https://corepunk.com/en-us/news/small-update-ahead-of-the-active-runes-artifact-bonuses-release-314 (the per-rune effect text/numbers exist only as 8 embedded images on that page, not extractable as text/OCR).

weapon_base is null from client data: all 100 weapon-kind items with a populated 'weapon' sub-object expose only class/spec/tier/use_type/weapon_type -- no damage or attack_time field exists on any weapon record. Two single-item community examples (Gun/T1, Daggers/T1) are merged in from corepunkers.com individual weapon pages -- see weapon_base entries' own 'note'/'source' fields; these are illustrative single data points (one named weapon's own Common-Epic roll range), NOT verified type-wide T1/T2/T3 baselines, and no source publishes a clean per-(weapon_type, tier) table.

stat_rolls is entirely null: 2 community item-page examples were found (corepunkers.com 'Assassin's Glove' T3: Attack Power [10-20]/Armor [30-50]/Physical Crit Chance [30-60]%; 'Magic Amplifier' T2: Spell Power [20-40]/Armor [30-50]) but each page shows ONE range spanning that item's own Common->Epic quality variance -- there is no per-(stat, tier, RARITY) breakdown table anywhere, so binding either range to a single rarity cell in this schema would be a fabrication. Left null across the board; the 2 examples are recorded here for reference, not merged into the grid.

dr curve shape (post-threshold efficiency): see dr_model.note and sourced_threshold_points -- corepunk.help/guides/stats (self-flagged WIP) gives single rating->percent anchor points for 7 secondary stats, not a continuous formula; the attack_speed point (600->0%) looks like a page error and is flagged suspicious, not relied upon.

mitigation formula: see mitigation_model -- same source gives one real anchor point (Armor/Magic Resistance 260 rating -> 59.1% reduction) which calibrates K~=180 IF the standard armor/(armor+K) formula is assumed; the formula itself is not stated by any source, only this one data point.

A pre-wipe (2025-06-30) official patch note also states the attack-speed soft cap was raised from 40% to 60%, and the overall damage-reduction soft cap was raised from 50% to 75% -- source: https://corepunk.com/en-us/news/7-month-milestone-current-status-next-steps-308. Both predate the 2026-06-25 'Great Reset' wipe and are flagged likely-stale; no post-wipe source confirms whether these caps still apply.

physical_crit_power.note: Zeroed on purpose (v2 contract): the sourced 2.0 base crit multiplier lives ONLY in combat.crit_base_power so it cannot be double-counted; Crit Power RATING from gear/talents adds on top of that base. The raw client code still reads 2.0.

magical_crit_power.note: Zeroed on purpose (v2 contract): the sourced 2.0 base crit multiplier lives ONLY in combat.crit_base_power so it cannot be double-counted; Crit Power RATING from gear/talents adds on top of that base. The raw client code still reads 2.0.

stat_rolls._bands_note: v6: cells are CLIENT-EXACT roll bands (value = band midpoint); community catalog data remains only as per-cell cross-check notes and as the fallback for stats absent from the client tables. Items carry their own per-(item, stat, rarity) stat_bands which take precedence.

dr_model.note: ASSUMPTION for the CURVE SHAPE past threshold -- full efficiency to threshold, 50% after. This is still an assumption: corepunk.help/guides/stats (web-sourced, self-flagged 'WIP' on the page) publishes a single rating-at-threshold -> effective-% data point per stat (see sourced_threshold_points below), not a continuous formula or multiple worked examples at other rating levels, so the shape of the curve between 0 and the threshold, and its exact behavior past it, remain unconfirmed. User-tunable in the engine via options.drOverride.

physical_crit_power.note: 200% matches client data exactly (Pcpb base=2.0 in client data). A pre-wipe patch note (https://corepunk.com/en-us/news/7-month-milestone-current-status-next-steps-308, 2025-06-30) says the base crit multiplier was changed 200%->150% in a balance pass; this WIP guide still shows 200%, so either it's stale or the change was reverted post-Great-Reset -- flagged conflict, 200% used as the better-corroborated current default.

magical_crit_power.note: Matches client data exactly (Mcpb base=2.0) -- same 150%-vs-200% conflict note as physical_crit_power.

attack_speed.note: SUSPICIOUS: 0% effective attack speed at the DR threshold makes no game-design sense (it would mean attack speed rating becomes worthless past 600) -- most likely a placeholder/typo on this self-flagged WIP page. Kept for transparency but should NOT be used as a real default; the generic piecewise_linear/0.5-efficiency assumption above should govern attack_speed instead.

mitigation_model.note: ASSUMPTION for the FORMULA itself, sourced ANCHOR POINT for calibration: no Corepunk source states the mitigation formula explicitly. IF the standard MOBA-style `mitigation = rating / (rating + K)` formula applies, the sourced anchor point (260 rating -> 59.1% reduction, for BOTH Armor and Magic Resistance) calibrates K = rating * (1/reduction - 1) ~= 260 * (1/0.591 - 1) ~= 180. This K is a DERIVED value from one data point under an assumed formula shape, not itself a confirmed formula -- documented as an assumption per the engine's documented mitigation rule (default was 'K documented as assumption, default 100 x target level scaling'; this K=180 constant replaces that generic default since we now have one real calibration point).

physical_crit_power.note: AMBIGUITY FLAG: the sourced 200%-at-threshold figure matches the BASE crit multiplier (crit_base_power 2.0) exactly, so this page cell may be showing the base multiplier rather than the rating-derived BONUS. If so, a linear 0.2353%/rating conversion double-counts the base. Kept per the v2 contract (derive linearly from each non-suspicious anchor) but flagged for the engine/UI to surface as an assumption.

magical_crit_power.note: AMBIGUITY FLAG: the sourced 200%-at-threshold figure matches the BASE crit multiplier (crit_base_power 2.0) exactly, so this page cell may be showing the base multiplier rather than the rating-derived BONUS. If so, a linear 0.2353%/rating conversion double-counts the base. Kept per the v2 contract (derive linearly from each non-suspicious anchor) but flagged for the engine/UI to surface as an assumption.

secondary_bands._note: CLOSED (v6): real client roll bands, decoded from the game client's own roll tables and validated against 111/112 community bands plus live server roll captures. Bands are mostly rarity-invariant for artifact stats (rarity gates the SLOT COUNT, not the band) but the client stores per-rarity slots and a few rows genuinely differ, so the full tier x rarity shape is kept.
secondary_bands._shape: secondary_bands[stat][tier][rarity] = [min,max]; 'rounding_step' per stat = roll quantisation step
secondary_bands._unit_note: UNIT WARNING: lifesteal and ability_steal bands are FRACTIONS in the client (e.g. [0.008, 0.012] = 0.8-1.2% per roll), unlike the other stats which roll as flat rating points -- consumers must not treat them as points. Shipped exactly as the client stores them.
